 marketing for a growing Australian digital products business. This is not an entry-level role, we need someone with 3–5 years of real, hands-on Klaviyo experience who knows the platform deeply.



What you'll be doing:



Klaviyo (70% of role): Build and send a weekly newsletter, create bi-monthly promotional campaigns, build and maintain automated flows, manage list segmentation and hygiene, set up affiliate promo
s, and track and report on performance.

Shopify (30% of role): Troubleshoot store issues, ensure digital products are accurately listed, manage apps, implement promotional pricing, and conduct regular store audits.



You must have: Minimum 3–5 years hands-on Klaviyo experience, proven flow and segmentation experience, strong written English, exceptional attention to detail, and availability during Australian business hours.



Dedicated 2 days are required.



To apply, start your message with "Klaviyo Ready" and include: a short intro, specific details of your Klaviyo experience (flow types, list sizes, industries), your Shopify experience, one example or screenshot of a flow or campaign you built, and your expected hourly rate.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Rockstar Cold Caller | Strictly B2B Experience Only
description:
We’re an Australian telemarketing company that partners with high-performing businesses across Australia. Our team specializes in generating qualified B2B appointments and building strong client relationships through professional outreach.



We’re looking for an experienced B2B Cold Caller who can confidently engage decision-makers, handle objections, and book quality appointments. This is a full-time role (no double jobs, please — we value focus and consistency).



Key Responsibilities: Conduct outbound B2B calls to company decision-makers in Australia. Qualify leads and set appointments based on campaign requirements. Maintain accurate records of calls and outcomes in CRM. Follow scripts and objection-handling frameworks effectively. Deliver results aligned with daily and weekly KPIs.



Qualifications: 

At least 1 year of solid B2B cold calling experience (required — we won’t consider applicants without this). 

Excellent English communication skills — clear, confident, and engaging. 

Strong understanding of sales communication and lead qualification. 

Comfortable working independently and meeting targets. 

Stable internet connection and noise-free work environment. 

Willing to work 6AM–3PM Manila Time (Australian shift).



Compensation & Growth: 550+ USD/month base depending on experience. Performance-based scaling and incentives available.



Important: We’re hiring for dedicated full-time tea
mbers only. Holding multiple jobs may affect your performance — if we find this to be the case, we’ll unfortunately have to let you go.



Application Requirements: Please include your DISC profile report (with a clear breakdown of your scores — no Tony Robbins reports, please) along with your resume and a short voice recording introducing yourself.



If you’re a driven cold caller who thrives on results and wants to grow with a supportive, fast-paced team — we’d love to hear from you!

title: Outbound Phone Consultant
description:
We're a fast-growing B2B outbound lead generation team based in Australia that's currently looking for outbound telemarketers to join our team.



All of our clients are Australian based so enjoy working daytime hours while working for a company that cares and has a great culture among our staff.



As a cold caller we expect you to have very high standard of spoken English and some cold calling experience is preferred. You will be an excellent sales person, not just reading from a script but having high level conversations with prospects. If you're good then we'll reward you.



You will be paid a base salary with generous commissions so expect to earn $600-$850+ usd per month minimum. This will be scaled based on performance



As part of your application, we require the following

- voice recording (if you're stuck for things to say tell us why you love sales and want to work as a cold caller)

- DISC profile that shows us the breakdown of your scores (no tony robbins reports please)



If you don't provide the above your application will not be considered.

title: Video Editor for Online Course — Short Talking Head Lessons
description:
The Project: 

I've recorded 15-20 short lessons for an online course. Raw videos are 5-10 minutes; final cuts should be around 5 minutes. Editing is straightforward: cut filler (ums, restarts, dead air), tighten pacing, basic polish. Not motion-graphics work — clean and clear is the goal.

 

Video Tasks: 

- Trim filler and pauses

- Light audio cleanup (normalize, basic noise reduction)

- Add captions/subtitles

- Add intro/outro bumper if I provide one

- Export as MP4 ready for upload



Requirements:

- Strong sense of pacing — knows when to cut

- Reliable turnaround

- Can work from a list of timestamps if I provide cuts, or use your own judgment if I don't



To Apply:

- Software you use

- Turnaround time per video

title: Marketing Assistant – Campaign Operations
description:
Role Summary

We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Marketing Assistant to support campaign execution, HubSpot operations, reporting, and cross-team coordination. This role is focused on improving speed of execution, managing multiple campaigns simultaneously, and ensuring consistent campaign tracking and reporting across all marketing channels.

The ideal candidate should be proactive, deadline-driven, and capable of handling rapid campaign deployment while maintaining accuracy and quality across deliverables.

Key Responsibilities

1. Campaign Setup & Execution

- Build, launch, and monitor marketing campaigns across
, blogs, landing pages, social media, and press releases

- Ensure campaigns are properly set up with correct tracking, tagging, and attribution in HubSpot

- Support campaign deployment from planning through execution

2. Rapid Campaign Deployment

- Execute time-sensitive campaigns within 24–72 hours

- Assist in launching POV campaigns including blog content,
 marketing, social media posts, and press releases

- Ensure quick turnaround without compromising quality and consistency

3. Campaign Management & Coordination

- Manage campaign calendars and scheduling to ensure deadlines are met

- Coordinate with content, design, and sales teams for campaign requirements and deliverables

- Follow up on timelines and maintain smooth workflow across departments

4. HubSpot Campaign Structuring

- Set up and manage HubSpot campaigns following proper naming conventions and asset organization

- Maintain accurate campaign tracking for reporting and attribution purposes

- Ensure all campaign assets are properly linked and monitored inside HubSpot

5. Reporting & Analytics

Prepare and monitor campaign performance reports including:

-
 performance (open rates, CTR, engagement)

- Social media engagement (impressions, clicks, interactions)

- Lead generation metrics (form submissions, contacts created)

- Funnel performance (meetings booked, pipeline contribution)

- Campaign attribution and influenced contacts

6. Continuous Optimization

- Monitor campaign performance and identify opportunities for improvement

- Recommend optimizations across messaging, channels, and conversion strategies

- Support testing and adjustments to improve campaign efficiency and results

7. Basic Creative Support

- Assist in creating and editing basic marketing visuals such as social media graphics,
 banners, blog images, landing page assets, and presentation materials 

- Support quick-turnaround design needs for campaign deployment while maintaining brand consistency 

- Coordinate with the design team for larger or more complex creative requirements



Expected Outcomes

- Support faster campaign execution within 24–72 hours for rapid campaigns

- Assist in managing 6–10 concurrent campaigns effectively

- Improve campaign consistency, tracking, and reporting accuracy

- Maximize HubSpot utilization for campaign management and optimization

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field preferred

- Experience in marketing support, campaign coordination, or digital marketing is an advantage

- Familiarity with HubSpot or similar CRM/marketing automation platforms preferred

- Strong organizational and project management skills

- Excellent attention to detail and ability to work under tight deadlines

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Ability to multitask and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

- Analytical mindset with comfort in reviewing campaign data and performance metrics

- Basic skills in graphic design and image editing using tools such as Canva, Adobe Photoshop, or similar platforms 

- Ability to create simple marketing visuals while following brand guidelines and campaign objectives



Performance Success Indicators

- Timely campaign launches and execution speed

- Accuracy of HubSpot campaign setup and reporting

- Number of campaigns successfully managed in parallel

- Lead generation and campaign contribution to pipeline growth

- Process improvement and optimization recommendations

title: Marketing and Creative Executive
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a Marketing and Creative Executive to support marketing and brand efforts through strong design execution, creative judgement, and asset management. This role oversees the development and quality of marketing assets, content, and videos, ensuring consistency, clarity, and good creative taste across all brand touchpoints.



This is a hands-on role focused on execution and quality control. You will work closely with leadership, while owning the day-to-day creation and upkeep of marketing materials.



Key Responsibilities

Creative Execution and Brand Consistency

Execute and maintain brand's visual standards across all marketing materials

Ensure consistency in layout, typography, colour usage, and overall presentation

Apply strong creative judgement when developing or refining assets



Design and Asset Development

Design pitch decks, pricing PDFs, proposals, and marketing assets

Use Canva as the primary tool for decks and collaborative assets

Use professional design software where appropriate to develop or refine assets

Maintain and improve templates to increase speed without compromising quality



Content and Video Oversight

Support and review marketing content across social, website, and outbound channels

Quality-check videos and visual assets used for marketing purposes

Coordinate with internal editors, designers, and external vendors as needed



Marketing Support and Systems

Support sales and leadership with clear, well-designed materials

Help organise and maintain a clean, accessible marketing asset library

Manage tasks and feedback through ClickUp and related tools



Requirements

Must-Have

Strong visual taste and attention to detail

Experience in design, branding, or creative marketing roles

Proficiency in Canva for pitch decks and marketing assets

Working proficiency in professional design software such as Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop, or equivalent

Ability to take feedback, iterate quickly, and work independently in a remote setup



Nice-to-Have

Agency or production industry experience

Familiarity with video or motion content

Basic understanding of marketing or sales support workflows





What Success Looks Like in the First 6 Months

Marketing and pitch assets are consistently clean, clear, and on-brand

Reduced rework on decks and materials before client-facing use

Faster turnaround of assets with steady improvement in quality

Leadership confidence in day-to-day marketing execution

title: 24 HR Review | VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Operations Manager (E-Commerce) — Build & Scale with Afina
description:
What This Role Really Is

This is not a “keep things running” operations role.



We’re looking for someone who can build, fix, and scale the operational backbone of Afina. Someone who sees inefficiencies and attacks them. Someone who negotiates harder, moves faster, and takes full ownership of outcomes.



Afina is growing fast across our own website and Amazon. Behind that growth is a complex system of suppliers, freight, inventory, and 3PL execution — and that’s where you come in.



What You’ll Own



End-to-End Operations

- You own the supply chain from factory to customer

- Forecast demand, plan inventory, and ensure we never stock out (or overstock)



Supplier & Cost Control

- Negotiate aggressively with international suppliers on pricing, MOQs, and terms

- Continuously find ways to improve margins



Logistics & Freight

- Manage freight (air/sea), compare quotes, and make cost vs speed decisions

- Own relationships with freight forwarders and 3PLs



3PL & Fulfillment

- Ensure orders go out fast, accurately, and cost-effectively

- Fix issues before they become problems



Amazon + DTC Operations

- Keep inventory synced and flowing across Amazon and our website

- Prevent operational bottlenecks that impact revenue



Systems & Scale

- Build SOPs, dashboards, and processes that scale

- Turn chaos into structure without slowing the business down



Who You Are

- You’ve already done this before in an e-commerce company (Shopify + Amazon + 3PL is your world)

- You understand international suppliers, freight, and inventory planning deeply

- You are extremely detail-oriented, but you don’t get stuck in analysis

- You’re a negotiator — you don’t accept the first price

- You move fast, take ownership, and don’t wait to be told what to do

- You care about profit, efficiency, and execution



What You’ve Done

- 5+ years in e-commerce operations

- Managed 3PLs and fulfillment workflows

- Worked directly with overseas manufacturers

- Negotiated freight and supplier pricing

- Built or improved operational systems that scaled



Why Afina

- High ownership — you will directly impact revenue and margins

- Fast growth — real problems to solve, not corporate maintenance

- No bureaucracy — speed and execution matter here

- Build something meaningful — not just manage it



Compensation

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based upside tied to results

- Room to grow into a senior leadership role as we scale



To apply, please go to:

title: Senior Accountant
description:
How you'll contribute:



Financial Accuracy & Compliance

Ensure the integrity and accuracy of financial records.

Maintain clean books, ensuring all transactions are properly classified and recorded.

Assist in local compliance and regulatory filings.



Month-End Close & Reconciliations

Lead month-end closing processes, ensuring all accounts are reconciled and financial reports are prepared on time.

Conduct bank, balance sheet, and general ledger reconciliations.

Identify and resolve discrepancies and anomalies before final reporting.



Bookkeeping Oversight & Supervision

Supervise and support junior bookkeepers to ensure data accuracy and efficient financial processing.

Provide guidance, training, and reviews to maintain high accounting standards.



Process Improvement & Reporting

Identify gaps in financial processes and suggest efficiencies for better reporting and compliance.

Work closely with the CFO to provide insights and reports for strategic decision-making.

Assist in implementing financial controls and best practices.



What you'll need to succeed in this role:

- Stickler for details and you're highly organized - good at organizing others too!

- Proven track record as an Accountant with more than 5+ years experience.

- Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

- Strong knowledge of month-end closing processes and financial reporting.

- Experience managing or supervising bookkeepers or junior accountants.

- Proficiency in accounting software – Both Xero and QuickBooks.

- High attention to detail and a problem-solving mindset.

- Comprehensive understanding of professional services business operations.

- Considerate person and know how to navigate human relationships diplomatically to achieve objectives.

- You work fast and pride yourself in getting a lot done in a short amount of time.

- Ability to work independently and proactively in a remote setting.

- Highly collaborative and communicative. You love working with others and are good at taking and giving instructions to achieve a common objective.

- You have great English speaking and writing capability.

- You're growth-minded and take responsibility for your own professional development, including staying up to date with the latest industry trends.

- You are experienced in using practice management software.

title: Creative Strategist (Ecommerce / Dropshipping)
description:
We are looking for an A-player Creative Strategist to join our ecommerce brand and help us scale. This is not a role for beginners. If you do not have a strong track record of results in ecommerce, please do not apply.



About the role:



We run Funnelish-based dropshipping stores in the health, beauty, and gadgets niches. We need someone who understands how to create creatives that actually convert and can help us scale what is already working while constantly bringing fresh ideas to the table.



What you will be responsible for:



Developing winning creative concepts for video and static ad creatives. Producing and directing UGC and AI-generated UGC video ads. Creating high-converting static image ads. Analysing what is working and making strong iterations to scale winning creatives. Staying ahead of trends in paid social advertising and applying them to our brands.



What we require from you:



Proven experience running creatives for Funnelish ecommerce stores. Deep knowledge of the health, beauty, and gadgets niches. A strong portfolio with real results you can show us. Experience with UGC, AI UGC, and static ad production. The ability to think strategically, not just execute. Someone who takes ownership and treats the business like their own.



We also offer performance bonuses for creatives that hit spending milestones with strong ROAS, meaning your earning potential grows with your results.



If you are average, this role is not for you. We are building something serious and only want to work with serious people.



Before applying, please note that we will require proof of past work and results before any engagement begins. No portfolio, no interview.



To confirm you have read this post in full, begin your application with the words: "I am an A-player."

title: AI Video Editor (Ecommerce)
description:
ABOUT US



We’re a rapidly scaling e-commerce company focused on producing high-performing video ads for direct-to-consumer brands across categories like health, footwear, and lifestyle.



Our team specializes in creating conversion-driven creatives at scale—and we’re expanding.



We’re currently hiring 2 AI Video Editors who can start immediately and join us within the week.



**



ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for editors who can produce highly realistic AI-generated ads that blend seamlessly with real-world footage. This role is perfect for someone who understands how to balance creativity with performance, and can consistently deliver high-volume ad variations.



You’ll be working on short-form, direct-response ads designed to convert across paid social platforms.



**



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



* Produce 20–50 AI-generated video ads per week across multiple brands.

* Generate AI avatars, UGC-style clips, and supporting visuals using modern AI tools.

* Edit all assets in CapCut with strong attention to pacing, structure, and polish.

* Research competitor creatives across platforms like Meta and Google to inspire new variations.

* Develop and test different hooks, angles, and concepts to improve performance.

* Support minor script tweaks or hook improvements when necessary (scripts are typically provided).



**



REQUIREMENTS



* Demonstrated experience creating AI-generated ads for ecommerce brands.

* Hands-on experience with tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs.

* Advanced CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio of work.

* Ability to generate realistic AI visuals (people, environments, product scenes).

* Strong understanding of direct-response creative principles.

* Capable of working independently while maintaining high output.



**



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE



* Familiarity with tools like Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora.

* Experience using Meta Ads Library or similar platforms for ad research.

* Background in producing UGC-style creatives for paid ads.



**



ROLE INFORMATION



* Commitment: Full-time (40 hours weekly)

* Compensation: $1,400 / month

* Schedule: Flexible working hours (Monday to Saturday)

* Location: Fully remote

* Availability: Immediate hiring for 2 positions (target onboarding: this week)



**



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To show that you’ve read the full job description, begin your application with:



AICreator492



Then answer the following:



1. Describe your step-by-step process for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style ad, starting from receiving a script up to delivering the final version in CapCut.

2. What tools do you currently use for AI video, image, and voice generation? Please include your skill level for each (beginner, intermediate, advanced).

3. What methods do you use to make AI-generated people and scenes look realistic for paid ads? How do you avoid common AI artifacts or unnatural visuals?

4. When reviewing competitor ads, what specific signals or elements do you focus on to identify high-performing creatives?

5. On average, how much time do you need to produce a fully AI-generated 25-second short-form ad from start to finish?

6. Share links to your portfolio showcasing realistic AI-generated e-commerce ads that demonstrate your ability to create high-converting content.



**



If you’re excited about pushing the limits of AI-generated video and building creatives that drive real results, we’d like to work with you.

title: Credit repair sales
description:
We are looking for a proven credit repair sales expert to join our team. Credit repair experience is mandatory — no exceptions.



The ideal candidate will have:

• A track record of successfully closing deals in the credit repair industry

• Strong communication skills with fluent English

• The ability to engage with leads, identify their pain points, and confidently present solutions that convert



In this role, you will be responsible for handling qualified leads, building trust with potential clients, and helping them take the next step toward improving their financial future.



If you have hands-on experience in credit repair sales and the drive to help clients change their lives, we want to hear from you!

title: Mobile App Publishing VA (App Store & Google Play)
description: The Publishing VA is responsible for managing the full end?to?end app publishing workflow for the studio’s app e osystem across Apple App Store Connect and Google Play Console. This includes uploading new builds, preparing metadata, adding screenshots and store assets, setting categories and age ratings, managing versioning, and ensuring all listings follow the studio’s standardized templates. The role requires daily monitoring of review queues, responding to rejections, fixing compliance issues, and resubmitting apps quickly to maintain uptime and revenue flow. The Publishing VA also performs quality checks on builds, verifies screenshots and links, maintains a clean publishing tracker, and provides weekly status updates. Success in this role requires strong attention to detail, excellent English, reliability, and the ability to follow structured SOPs while handling high?volume publishing in a fast, engine?based environment.

title: Bookkeeper & Administrator
description:
Position Description – Bookkeeper (Full Time, Remote – Philippines)

Employer: DCON Painting & Sons Pty Ltd

Reports to: Director 



We are a family owned and operated Commercial Painting Company with over 90 years combined experience, we have grown significantly in the past few years to successfully service all Commercial Painting contracts across all of Regional Victoria including Ballarat, Geelong & Melbourne. We take pride in accuracy, efficiency, and attention to detail across both our finance and operational functions.

We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Bookkeeper & Administrator to support our finance function and business compliance requirements. The role is partly focused on accounts payable, purchase orders, bank reconciliations, and maintaining accurate financial records. The other focus will be assisting with the compliance such as attending to SWIM safe methods, inbox management, and attend to other Occupational Health & Safety compliance requirements. The successful candidate will work with cloud-based systems including Xero, Simpro and Microsoft products.



Key Responsibilities

•Accounts Payable:

o Manage invoices that arrive via
 into Simpro or Xero, ensuring they are coded correctly.

o Confirm every invoice is linked to a Purchase Order (PO) before being synced into Xero. Ensure costs are correctly allocated to the right projects/jobs.

o Identify mismatches between invoices and POs and escalate for review.

o Process supplier invoices accurately and in a timely manner.

o Reconcile supplier statements and maintain accurate AP ledgers.

•General Bookkeeping:

o Perform bi-weekly reconciliations in Xero.

o Ensure all transactions are accurately allocated with supporting documentation.

o Attend to payroll for 5-8 staff. 

o Assist with general ledger reconciliations.

o Provide financial admin support to the finance team as required.

o Inter-company loan reconciliations.

o End-of-month close checklist & preparation of monthly reports.

•General Administration, Compliance & OH&S Support:

o Set up SWMS / SWIMs and job compliance documentation in Simpro for each new project, ensuring all required documents are completed and issued prior to site commencement. 

o Assist with job start up administration in Simpro, including linking relevant compliance documents to jobs and supporting the operational start up process.

o Prepare, complete, and maintain supplier and subcontractor warranty documentation, including: 

? Completing warranty templates where required

? Collecting warranty information from suppliers and subcontract painters

? Ensuring warranties meet head contractor and builder requirements

? Uploading and filing warranties correctly in Simpro and internal systems

o Compile and maintain builder / head contractor welcome packs for operational teams using information stored in Simpro, including: 

? Builder and site contact details

? Site address and project information

? Relevant induction, onboarding, and administrative documentation

o Maintain accurate and up to date builder, head contractor, and subcontractor records in Simpro, including contact details, compliance documents, and job specific requirements.

o Support a highly subcontractor reliant commercial painting environment, ensuring documentation flows correctly between painters, suppliers, head contractors, and internal teams.

? Provide general administrative support including inbox management, scheduling assistance, and compliance tracking as required.



Ideal Qualifications & Attributes

• 2+ years in bookkeeping, financial administration, or accounts payable.

• Experience with Xero and cloud-based finance systems.

• Familiarity with Simpro + PO workflows in construction.

• Strong knowledge of GST in Australia and how it applies to invoices and expenses.

• Exceptionally high attention to detail and accuracy.

• Organised and structured work habits.

• Strong communication skills and English proficiency (written).

• Previous experience with Australian businesses (construction industry preferred).

Practical Requirements

• 5-day availability during Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT).

• Quiet, dedicated workspace.

• Reliable high-speed internet connection with back-up access.

• Commitment to a long-term role.

We Offer

• Training and support from an experienced finance team.

• Long-term growth opportunities within a stable, established company.

• A supportive and professional remote work environment where your contribution is valued.



Application Process

Please submit:

• Your updated resume and LinkedIn profile link.

• Names and contact details of three references (2 professional + 1 personal).

Test Questions (for application)

1. Purchase Orders

o Why is it important to ensure that every invoice is matched to a PO in the construction industry?

o If an invoice comes into SmoothX (ProScan which is a part of Simpro software) without a matching PO, what steps would you take?

2. GST

o An invoice shows a total of $5,500 including GST. How much is the GST component, and what is the net amount before GST?

o A subcontractor’s invoice comes through SmoothX but states “Not registered for GST.” How would you code this in Xero?

3. Practical AP Scenario

o You receive an invoice for concrete supplies
ed into SmoothX. The PO in Procore shows 100 units at $10 each, but the invoice shows 120 units at $10 each. What would you do before processing this invoice?

4. Bank Reconciliation

o During reconciliation, you notice a $200 payment in the bank feed that does not yet match to a bill in Xero. What process would you follow?



Thanks in advance for your consideration and application.

title: Streetwear Sourcing Research Analyst (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
About the Role



We're hiring a Sourcing Research Analyst to help us find, vet, and surface deals across the sneaker and streetwear market. This isn't a "copy-paste from a spreadsheet" job. You'll be trained on a real deal-scoring framework, given clear criteria, and trusted to bring qualified leads to the table every single day.

If you're the type of person who opens a browser and immediately starts looking for angles — this role is for you.





What You'll Do



Research sneaker and streetwear products across retail sites, marketplaces, and liquidation sources using defined buying criteria (margin %, ROI/day, velocity benchmarks)

Deliver a structured daily lead list — product name, size, cost, estimated payout, margin, source link

Flag market trends, restocks, and time-sensitive opportunities proactively, not just when asked

Track deal outcomes and help refine sourcing criteria over time based on what converts

Communicate clearly and on time — no ghosting, no vague updates

What We're Looking For



Proactive by nature. You don't wait to be told what to look for — you build your own methods, find your own sources, and show up with ideas.

Detail-oriented. One wrong number in a lead changes the whole decision. Accuracy isn't optional.

Fast learner. You'll be trained on our specific deal-scoring system. We expect you to internalize it within the first 2-3 weeks, not 3 months.

Strong written English. All communication is async and written — Discord, Notion, Google Sheets. You need to communicate clearly without hand-holding.

Comfortable with structured work. You'll follow SOPs, use templated formats, and report within defined systems. This is an execution role with real ownership.

Qualifications



Experience with sneakers, streetwear, Amazon FBA, or any resale/arbitrage market

Proven skills and experience in:

E-commerce or Wholesale

KPI data analysis

Commitment to learn and apply Bron Distributions Guiding People and Business Practices

Bonus:



Familiarity with StockX, GOAT, or similar platforms

Prior VA or remote analyst experience

Compensation



USD $4–7/hour depending on experience, accuracy, and output quality.

Performance bonuses available for purchased profitable leads

Hours: ~10–20 hrs/week, flexible schedule

Paid biweekly via Wise





About Bron Distributions



Bron Distributions is a fast-growing Canadian wholesale and resale operation moving product across StockX, GOAT, eBay, and direct B2B channels. We're not a side hustle — we run structured capital allocation models, proprietary deal evaluation tools, and a custom inventory management system. We prioritize a fast-paced learning environment built on communication, transparency, and accountability.

title: Customer Success Specialist
description:
Customer Success Specialist (Career Services) | Spanish



Last year KAMI launched a new project in a new industry to support and empower job seekers worldwide, to unlock their potential and confidently overcome barriers on their path to professional success.



We offer a career coaching service that supports job seekers at every stage of their journey: from crafting strong resumes and optimizing LinkedIn profiles to landing their dream offers.

We are looking for a Spanish-speaking Customer Success Specialist to ensure a high level of user support on their way to finding a perfect job. This is an opportunity to work with an international audience, influence the customer experience, help users make the most of our services.



Responsibilities:

Hold one-on-one career consultations via Google Meet, providing practical job search advice and recommendations.

Create and improve resumes and cover letters.

Conduct LinkedIn profile audits and provide structured recommendations.

Upselling relevant services during communication with clients.

Research job openings and recruiters based on specific client requests.

Minimize the risk of negative feedback and chargebacks.

Work with CRM and internal team tools.





Requirements:

English and Spanish proficiency at Advanced level or higher.

Experience working with international clients via phone or video calls.

Strong communication skills: ability to handle client requests professionally and promptly.

Attention to detail and structured thinking.

Solution-oriented mindset.

Flexibility to work on evenings and weekends if needed.

Nice-to-have:

Experience with CRM systems.

Experience in sales.

Genuine interest in career coaching and working with people.

We offer:

Competitive salary.

Fully remote work.

20 paid leaves.

Startup environment with high responsibility and impact.

Opportunity to develop expertise in international career consulting.

Real career growth to Shift Manager / Team Lead.

Work in a team building a new product for the global market.

Hiring process: 

If your CV meets our requirements, we reach out to organize a short intro call.

If it’s a match, we ask you to complete a test assignment.

In case of successful completion of the assignment, we invite you to an interview.

If everything suits us both, we send you an offer!

If this all sounds like you, and something you are interested in, do not hesitate to apply! and send your resume at

title: Logistics & Purchasing Coordinator
description:
Logistics & Purchasing Coordinator



BIG Foods Australia 

 

About Us

We are a growing food manufacturing business supplying supermarkets, airlines, and retail channels in Australia. We are looking for a highly organised Logistics & Purchasing Coordinator to support daily operations across orders, freight, and purchasing.

________________________________________

 

Key Responsibilities



Will be using supermarket online platforms and Fishbowl Inventory.



Logistics & Orders

• Process and enter customer orders 
 + portals) 

• Ensure customer purchase orders match Fishbowl totals (pricing, quantities, units) 

• Book and coordinate freight (local & interstate) 

• Prepare dispatch paperwork (delivery dockets, labels, ASN) 

• Liaise with warehouse and transport providers 

• Ensure all orders are picked, dispatched, and delivered on time 

________________________________________

 

Systems & Inventory

• Work daily in Fishbowl Inventory Software

• Manage sales orders, transfer orders, and stock movements 

• Check stock availability against orders and production 

• Maintain accurate data across Fishbowl and transport systems 

________________________________________

 

Purchasing Support

• Raise purchase orders in Fishbowl 

• Follow up suppliers on deliveries 

• Track incoming stock and update systems 

• Support procurement to avoid stockouts and delays 

________________________________________

 

Process & Accuracy

• Follow structured workflows and daily checklists 

• Ensure no missed orders or incorrect dispatches 

• Identify and flag errors or system issues 

________________________________________

 

What You MUST Be Good At

• Extremely organised 

• Detail-focused (this is critical) 

• Comfortable with systems and data 

• Able to follow processes 

• Strong communication with: 

o Warehouse 

o Suppliers 

o Transport companies 

________________________________________

 

Required Experience

• FMCG, food manufacturing, or logistics experience 

• Experience with inventory/order systems (Fishbowl Inventory a must) 

• Experience booking freight 

• Experience raising and managing purchase orders 

________________________________________

 

Success in This Role

• Orders entered accurately and match customer POs 

• Freight booked correctly with no missed cut-offs 

• Stock always aligned between system and physical 

• Purchasing supports smooth production (no stockouts)

title: [Part time] Executive Assistant
description:
Hey! Thanks for checking this out.



We are on the hunt for a sharp, seasoned Executive Assistant to help our CEO stay on top of things. This is a part-time role starting at 10 hours a week, but if you’re a great fit, there’s definitely room for that to grow. 

This isn’t a "learn-as-you-go" spot. We need someone who has already operated at the executive level and understands the pace, discretion, and proactivity required to support a CEO. And we will not be training on the basics. 



What You’ll Be Doing



You will basically own the calendar and the moving parts so the CEO can focus on the big picture. The CEO will count on you for: 



1. Handling complex travel and booking personal appointments.

2. Managing
 flow and making calls to US-based contacts to schedule lunches, home repairs, and meetings.

3. The CEO wants to work with someone who can see around corners. You are resourceful enough to solve problems independently, but respectful of boundaries and know when a quick check-in is necessary.



What We Need From You



1. You need to be professional and highly confident speaking English on calls. 

2. Ability to work a 2-hour window that overlaps with US Mountain Time (specifically around 8:00 AM – 10:00 AM or 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM MT) to handle real-time calls.

3. You’ve done this before for high-level executives, and you’re comfortable with the responsibility.



If you are confident, you can jump in and handle this, we’d love to hear from you. Please fill out our intake form:

title: Part-Time Operations VA — Window Cleaning Company (remote)
description:
We're a fast-growing window cleaning and exterior services company based in Tennessee, USA. We're looking for a sharp, organized part-time VA (approximately 20 hours/week) to help manage our day-to-day operations. This role has strong potential to grow into a full-time position within 1-2 months as we scale.

You'll work directly with the business owners and our CFO team to keep our operations running smoothly. This is a real opportunity to grow with a company that's scaling fast.

What You'll Do



Data entry: log completed jobs, track upsells, record payments collected per job and per technician

Track technician performance (jobs completed, revenue generated, tips, Google reviews earned)

Update and maintain our CRM (Housecall Pro) with accurate job and client data

Coordinate with our payroll officer to ensure technician hours and commissions are accurately recorded before each payroll run

Flag discrepancies in job data, payments, or technician records

Manage scheduling and calendar coordination for the operations team

Handle basic admin tasks: organize documents, send follow-up messages to clients or employees as directed, maintain tracking spreadsheets

Communicate with technicians via WhatsApp to collect missing information or confirm job details



Who We're Looking For



Detail-oriented and organized — you catch errors before they become problems

Proactive — you follow up without being asked, and you flag issues before they escalate

Strong written English communication

Experience with CRMs, spreadsheets (Google Sheets or Excel), and data entry

Comfortable learning new software quickly (we use Housecall Pro, Google Workspace, Notion)

Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment

Available to work during US Central Time business hours (flexible on exact hours)



Bonus Points



Previous experience with a home services, field services, or trades company

Familiarity with Housecall Pro or similar field service management software

Experience supporting payroll processes



Hours and Pay



Start: approximately 20 hours/week

Expected to grow to 40 hours/week within 1-2 months

Competitive hourly rate based on experience

Long-term opportunity for the right person



To Apply

Please include in your application:



A brief intro about yourself and your relevant experience

One specific example of how you caught or fixed a data or operations problem at a previous job

Your availability and time zone



We move fast and will respond quickly to strong applicants.

title: Outbound Sales Caller + Outreach Assistant — Home Services (US Market)
description:
I run a private call exchange connecting home service contractors (plumbing, water damage) with inbound calls from US homeowners. I need a dedicated assistant to handle outbound outreach and recruiting on both sides of the business.



Your daily tasks:



Make outbound calls to US contractors from a provided list using a provided script (qualifying them as potential buyers)



Book warm prospects onto my calendar for 15-minute closing calls



Post in
 groups using provided copy (publisher recruitment)



Send LinkedIn connection requests to a target list daily



Send cold
 batches using provided templates via Gmail



Respond to inbound DMs and inquiries within 30 minutes during work hours



What I provide:



Full scripts for every task



Contact lists (no research required)



Templates for all posts and
s



Daily task checklist



Weekly PayPal payment



Requirements:



Excellent spoken and written English



Comfortable making outbound phone calls to US businesses



Reliable internet and quiet work environment



Available during US Central Time (overlap of at least 4–5 hours)



Experience in sales, lead generation, or outreach preferred



This is a long-term position with room to grow as the business scales. I pay on time every week without exception.

title: Short-term Rental Operation Manager
description:
Summary



Zen Living Short-term Rentals is looking for Operation Manager. We are a short-term rental management company that manages over 150 listings in the US, Canada, and more. We are looking for Airbnb/short-term rental experts to join our team to provide good guest experience and represent the best interest of our owner partners. This role requires expert knowledge on Airbnb and the individual needs to be super responsive with strong reasoning skills to fill in 12-hour shifts for Thursday-Saturday plus alternating Sundays.



Duties



Guest Communication:



- Prompt responses: Respond to guest messages within 5 minutes (With AI’s help), even faster with urgent issues (Look for messages from Airbnb, VRBO, [BookingD0tcom],
, Text, Whatsapp groups, Openphone)

- Issue Resolution: Be resourceful in trying to find a resolution to guest questions or issues

- Follow-up: Keep a list of ongoing issues including guest special requests, maintenance issues, and refund issues, and keep reporting to the management team and owners

- Reservation Alterations: Handle reservation alterations as needed.

- Resolution Center: Manage extra fees and follow up on resolutions.

- Eviction: Ask guests to leave if broken house rules or late check-outs



Airbnb Support Communication:



- Review Disputes: Handle disputes related to guest reviews.

- Airbnb Cases: Communicate and resolve issues with Airbnb support.



Owner communication



- Promptly coordinate between owner, company management team, and other service providers

- Answer owner questions using our SOP guidlines and previous Airbnb knowledge



Other:



- Call local police for assistance in eviction

- Research and find local service providers such as cleaners, plumbers etc

- Quick edits on listing descriptions and auto messages

- Help transition to the next shift and point out key things to follow up

- Write reviews and encourage reviews for various platform

- Coordinate with service vendors such as cleaner, plumber as needed



Softwares we use:



- Hospitable

- Open Phone(Quo)

- Google Suite

- WhatsApp

- WeChat

- Airbnb

- VRBO

- [BookingD0tcom]

- Pricelabs

- Host Buddy AI



QUALIFICATIONS:



- Exclusive Commitment: MUST WORK EXCLUSIVELY FOR MY COMPANY

- Preferred Experience: Experience as an Airbnb Support Ambassador or Airbnb Case Manager is preferred.

- Software: Experience with VRBO, [BookingD0tcom], Hospitable, Hostbuddy AI is a plus

- Work Hours: Must willing to work 12-hour-shift in front of the computer with a focus for at least 3 days a week

- Internet: Must have a stable high-speed internet connection and a contingency plan for backup.

- Work Environment: Must work in a quiet environment with a stable signal

- Language Skills: Proficient in English with excellent communication skills. Chinese is preferred.

- Customer Service Background: At least 2 years of guest communication in short-term rental management company is required.

- Have experience following standard operating procedure

- Have experience working with AI response software is a strong plus. (Knowing when to intervene and overwrite AI, when to delegate to AI.)



Expected Pay



Shift to choose from: 12-hour-shifts a day, Either EST 3pm-3am or 3am-3pm, 3-4 days a week. transition to next shift doesn’t count towards additional hours



3 month probation period: $4 USD/hr



After probation period: Increase to $5 USD/hr for months 4-12, increase to $6USD/hr after 12 months. on non-holidays and $10/hr on all Philippine public holidays during the shifts. Plus 13th-Month prorated bonus Pay and performance bonus available.



How to Apply



Send the following to







- Resume

- Audio: Please record yourself on your phone (audio or video, but unedited) and let us know 1) who you are and 2) why you are a good fit for this position 3)Your reason for left previous position or thinking of leaving current position 4)your experience in dealing with unhappy customer. Put the recording in a google drive link and send it to our
.

- Subject line on the
: “[Job position] - (Last name, first name)

- When applying for this job position, please let me know who the CEO of Airbnb is at the END of the
.

title: Client Solutions & Sales Coordinator
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:



Client Solutions & Sales Coordinator (Australian MSP | Remote) 

Remote – Philippines

Occasional on-site in Pampanga for tea
etings 

PHP 35,000 – PHP 45,000/month 

Work hours aligned to Adelaide, South Australia time (8:00 AM – 5:00 PM ACST) 

Full-time | Permanent



About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and commercially minded professional to support our sales and client coordination operations for an Australian Managed Service Provider (MSP). This is a fully remote position, but candidates must be located in Pampanga or a nearby province in Central Luzon — as occasional on-site attendance in Pampanga will be required for important tea
etings. 



This is not a technical support or IT engineering role. The focus is on sales coordination, proposal support, customer communication, and solution recommendation — with only a basic understanding of IT concepts required.



Key Responsibilities

Prepare and follow up on quotes and proposals for customers

Engage directly with clients on smaller requests such as laptop replacements, licensing changes, and minor service needs

Understand customer requirements and research suitable hardware and licensing options, then present clear recommendations

Proactively identify and suggest additional items or improvements (e.g. monitors, docks, accessories) to complete the overall solution

Handle ordering of hardware and services from suppliers

Manage invoicing and supplier bills using Xero (raising invoices, processing bills)

Coordinate with the internal technical team for requirements gathering and job handover

Ensure all client engagements are accurately tracked and followed through to completion



Requirements

At least 3–5 years of experience in a sales support, admin, or operations role

Strong written and spoken English — must be confident communicating directly with clients

Tech-literate — able to understand hardware, software licensing, and basic IT concepts (no engineering background required)

Experience preparing quotes and proposals, and managing customer communication

title: Advanced Excel & Google Sheets Specialist
description:
Advanced Excel And Google Sheets Specialist



Contract Role | Remote



We are seeking a highly skilled Excel and Google Sheets specialist to design and build advanced spreadsheet systems that track business performance, KPIs, and operational metrics.



This role is ideal for someone who is exceptionally strong with complex formulas, data modelling, dashboards, and automation, and who enjoys turning raw or fragmented data into clear, structured business intelligence.



You will work directly with the business owner to build spreadsheet systems that connect daily operational data with global reporting dashboards, helping leadership monitor performance across the business.



Key Responsibilities:



• Design and build advanced Excel and Google Sheets models

• Create KPI dashboards and business performance reporting systems

• Develop complex formulas and dynamic calculations

• Build daily task trackers and operational input sheets that automatically feed into global dashboards

• Create structured systems where team activity data flows into master reporting spreadsheets

• Clean, structure and transform datasets for analysis

• Implement visual dashboards for management reporting

• Develop spreadsheet systems that minimise manual work and reduce errors

• Troubleshoot and optimise existing spreadsheets



Required Skills



You must be extremely proficient in both Excel and Google Sheets, including:



Advanced Formulas

Array formulas

Nested IF logic

INDEX / MATCH

XLOOKUP

SUMIFS / COUNTIFS

QUERY

FILTER

INDIRECT

TEXT functions

Dynamic arrays

Data Analysis

Pivot tables

Data modelling

Data cleaning and transformation

Scenario modelling

Dashboard Development

KPI dashboards

Visual data presentation

Charts and performance tracking

Automation

Google Sheets automation

Excel Power Query

Excel Power Pivot

Optional: Google Apps Script



Nice to Have (Highly Valued)



• Experience building financial models or operational dashboards

• Experience designing business reporting frameworks

• Experience working with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM data

• Ability to integrate daily operational tracking systems with global reporting dashboards

• Experience with API connections or data integrations



What Success Looks Like



The successful contractor will be able to:



• Translate business questions into clear analytical frameworks

• Build spreadsheets that are structured, scalable, and easy to maintain

• Create professional KPI dashboards for leadership decision-making

• Design systems where daily activity tracking automatically feeds into business performance reporting



Engagement Structure



• Contract / freelance role

• Remote work

• Flexible hours

• Project-based with potential ongoing work



To Apply



Please include:



Examples of advanced dashboards or spreadsheet systems you have built

A short explanation of the most complex spreadsheet project you have completed

Which tools you prefer most: Excel, Google Sheets, or both



If you enjoy building high-performance spreadsheet systems that turn data into actionable insight, we would love to hear from you.

title: Sales & Account Manager
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Work Hours:  Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

Industry: Events, Experiential Marketing, Venue Partnerships, Fan Engagement



About Us



We are a growing Australian experiential services company specialising in photo booth experiences, venue installations, fan engagement and brand activations across sport, entertainment, and events.



We help brands connect with audiences through memorable activations and long-term venue partnerships. Our team is collaborative, targets outcomes, and champions quality client experiences.



Role Overview



We are seeking a highly motivated Sales & Account Manager to drive revenue and grow strategic relationships. This is a hybrid sales role - combining inbound lead conversion, outbound prospecting, and account management.



You will be responsible for:



 - Converting inbound enquiries into confirmed bookings

 - Prospecting new clients via LinkedIn, Instagram,
,
 and cold outreach

 - Securing new venue partnerships and installation agreements

 - Managing and growing existing accounts



This is not high-volume telemarketing - it’s strategic sales and business development with meaningful impact.



Key Responsibilities



 Inbound & Outbound Sales:

 - Respond to inbound enquiries and convert to bookings

 - Perform outbound sales activities (social selling, cold outreach)

- Identify and engage target clients such as professional sports clubs, sponsors, event companies, agencies and venues (cinemas, bars, entertainment centres, tourist attractions, etc)

 - Book discovery calls and follow up persistently



Account Management 

 - Manage existing client relationships

 - Upsell and cross-sell services where appropriate

 - Maintain strong communication from booking through to event delivery



CRM & Reporting

 - Document all activity in our CRM (deals, tasks, follow-ups)

 - Maintain accurate pipelines for events, activations, venues

 - Meet monthly KPIs for activity and revenue



What We’re Looking For



Required

 - 3–5+ years in sales, business development or account management

 - Excellent written and spoken English

 - Proven success with outbound prospecting (LinkedIn,
, social outreach, phone)

 - Comfortable working with Australian clients during Australian business hours

 - CRM experience (e.g. GoHighLevel or similar)



Advantageous

 - Experience in events, experiential marketing, venues or sponsorship

 - A consultative sales approach (not transactional)

 - Comfortable with targets and tracking KPIs

 - Strategic Sales Plan creation and implementation



Compensation & Incentives



On-Target Earnings (OTE): Up to PHP 95,000+ /month (base + monthly performance bonuses)



Monthly Performance Bonus Structure Includes:

 - Event revenue growth bonuses for bookings closed 

 - Outbound activity and qualified meetings requirements

 - Venue partnership bonuses for installation agreements

 - Set commission on direct sales of photo booths



Why This Role?



 - Strategic sales role with both inbound and proactive outbound 

 - Opportunity to build long-term, high-value relationships

 - Clear performance incentives that reward results

 - Remote team with growth potential

 - Employer experience with offshore employees (high retention of emplyees from 2 to 5+ years)

title: 3D Rendering Specialist – Pool Construction & Remodel Designs (Dallas-Based U.S. Company)
description:
We're a growing pool construction and remodeling company based in the Dallas, Texas area, and we're looking for a skilled 3D Rendering Specialist to join our team long-term. You'll be the visual storyteller who turns our clients' backyard dreams and remodel ideas into photorealistic renderings that help close deals.



**What You'll Be Doing:**

• Create high-quality 3D renderings of custom pools, spas, water features, and outdoor living spaces

• Produce remodel renderings (kitchens, bathrooms, exterior, full property remodels)

• Work from photos, measurements, sketches, and client notes we provide

• Make revisions quickly based on client feedback

• Communicate clearly about design progress and timelines

• Deliver clean, professional files ready to present to clients



**Required Skills:**

• Proven experience with 3D rendering software – Pool Studio, Vip3D, SketchUp, Lumion, Enscape, V-Ray, 3ds Max, or Chief Architect

• Strong portfolio showing pool/outdoor or residential remodel work (please send samples)

• Ability to produce photorealistic lighting, textures, and landscaping

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy with measurements

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Reliable internet and ability to overlap with Central Time (Dallas) hours



**Bonus Points:**

• Experience specifically with Pool Studio or Vip3D

• Background in landscape architecture or residential design

• Ability to produce walkthrough animations or VR-ready files

• Familiarity with U.S. residential construction standards



**The Setup:**

• Starts as part-time / per-project (gig basis) with strong potential to grow into a full-time role

• Pay based on experience and portfolio quality – tell us your rate

• Long-term, stable work for the right person — we have consistent project flow

• Direct hire, no agency in the middle



**To Apply, Please Send:**

1. Your portfolio (links or PDF) — pool/outdoor work especially

2. Software you use most

3. Your rate (per render or hourly)

4. How quickly you can typically turn around a single rendering

5. A short note about why this role interests you



Looking forward to building a long-term partnership with the right artist.

title: Business Development Manager – Recruitment Sales
description:
Business Development Manager – Recruitment Sales



About Us



We are a growing recruitment company specializing in permanent placements within the healthcare sector. We are now expanding into new niche markets and are looking for a strong Business Development Manager to help us generate new client opportunities, build relationships, and close signed recruitment clients.



Role Overview



This is a full-cycle business development role focused on client acquisition for permanent placements. You will be responsible for generating leads through cold
, cold calling, and LinkedIn outreach, booking and attending client meetings, presenting our recruitment services, and closing new business.



We are looking for someone who is proactive, confident, and experienced in B2B sales or recruitment sales.



Key Responsibilities

Generate new business opportunities through cold
, cold calling, LinkedIn outreach, and other outbound strategies

Identify companies with permanent hiring needs in healthcare and other niche markets

Reach out to decision-makers such as hiring managers, executives, business owners, and talent leaders

Book and attend qualified client meetings

Present our recruitment services and understand each prospect’s hiring needs

Manage the sales process from prospecting to signed client agreement

Maintain a strong pipeline and follow up consistently with prospects

Work with the recruitment team to ensure a smooth handoff once a client is signed



KPIs



Success in this role will be measured by your ability to consistently generate qualified opportunities and convert them into signed clients.



Target KPIs:



At least 2 qualified client meetings per week

At least 2 signed clients per month

Consistent outbound activity through
, phone, and LinkedIn

Strong follow-up and pipeline management





Who We’re Looking For



The ideal candidate has:



3+ yrs experience in B2B sales, business development, recruitment sales, staffing, or client acquisition

Strong cold outreach experience via
, phone, and LinkedIn

Confidence speaking with decision-makers

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Ability to handle objections and close deals

A consultative sales approach

Self-motivation and ability to work independently

Experience in healthcare recruitment or permanent placements is a plus, but not required



Compensation

How to Apply

Cold
, cold calling, and LinkedIn outreach

Booking and attending client meetings
