title: Senior Healthcare Recruiter — US Healthcare Market
description:
Senior Healthcare Recruiter — US Healthcare Market



Full-Time | Remote | $800–$1,000 USD Base + Commission | Weekly Pay



Are you an experienced healthcare recruiter who knows how to find, engage, and close top clinical talent in the US market?



We’re looking for a Senior Healthcare Recruiter to join our growing recruiting team and help connect qualified healthcare professionals with meaningful career opportunities across the United States. This is a great fit for someone who is driven, organized, confident speaking with candidates, and experienced recruiting for clinical roles such as **Registered Nurses, Imaging Techs, and Nursing Leaders**.



If you thrive in a fast-paced recruiting environment, enjoy building strong candidate pipelines, and want a long-term remote role with reliable pay and growth potential, we’d love to hear from you.



What You’ll Do



* Recruit for US healthcare roles, including **RNs, MRI Techs, CT Techs, X-Ray Techs, Nursing Leaders**, and other clinical positions

* Source qualified candidates using platforms such as **Indeed, 
, SMS outreach**, and other recruiting channels

* Conduct screening calls and interviews to assess experience, qualifications, communication skills, and overall fit

* Build and manage active candidate pipelines for current openings and future hiring needs

* Present qualified candidates and guide them through the hiring process

* Maintain consistent follow-up and deliver a strong candidate experience from first contact through placement

* Meet performance goals for outreach, submissions, interviews, and successful placements



What We’re Looking For



*3+ years of US recruiting experience**

* Strong experience recruiting for **US healthcare roles**

* Proven success filling positions such as **Registered Nurses, Imaging Techs, and Nursing Leadership roles**

* Strong sourcing, screening, follow-up, and relationship-building skills

* Comfortable working in a target-based, performance-driven recruiting environment

* Ability to work independently, stay organized, and manage multiple open roles at once

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* High attention to detail and a strong sense of accountability



What We Offer



*Competitive base pay plus commission

*Weekly reliable pay

* Paid time off

* US holidays off

**100% work-from-home setup

* Supportive, team-oriented environment

* Long-term growth opportunity within a performance-focused recruiting team

* The chance to make a real impact by helping healthcare professionals find better career opportunities



Why Join Us?



You’ll be part of a recruiting team that values consistency, accountability, communication, and results. We provide the structure and support you need to succeed while giving you the opportunity to grow your recruiting career in the US healthcare market.



This is not just another sourcing role. We’re looking for someone who can own the recruiting process, build strong candidate relationships, and help drive successful placements.



How to Apply



Please apply with:



1. A brief summary of your US healthcare recruiting experience

2. The types of healthcare roles you have successfully filled

3. The recruiting tools and platforms you have used

4. Your recent placement or recruiting results, if available



Qualified applicants with strong US healthcare recruiting experience will be prioritized.

title: Electrical Estimator (Residential & Commercial)
description:
Wadi Electric is a growing electrical contracting company serving Maryland, Washington DC, and Northern Virginia. We are looking for an experienced Electrical Estimator to help us price residential and light commercial projects accurately, competitively, and profitably.



Our primary focus is residential electrical work, service upgrades, rewires, additions, remodels, EV chargers, generators, and light commercial projects.



Project sizes typically range from $50, yes000 to $2,000,000.



We are looking for someone highly experienced who can produce detailed, organized, and accurate estimates with minimal supervision while coordinating with our Master Electrician when needed.



Expected production:

20–40 estimates per month.



Primary goal:

Win profitable work while maintaining strong margins.



Responsibilities:



• Review plans, scope documents, and customer requirements

• Perform quantity takeoffs

• Build detailed labor and material estimates

• Price residential and light commercial electrical work

• Analyze project specifications and identify missing scope

• Coordinate with suppliers for material pricing

• Build professional estimate packages and proposals

• Review code requirements and installation requirements

• Identify permit requirements where applicable

• Value engineer projects for profitability

• Suggest alternates and cost-saving options

• Track bid status and revisions

• Review awarded projects for handoff to field team

• Maintain estimating templates and pricing systems

• Coordinate with management and Master Electrician for technical review



Types of work you will estimate:



• Panel upgrades / service upgrades

• Whole-home rewires

• EV charger installations

• Generator systems

• Dedicated circuits

• Lighting packages

• Smart home electrical upgrades

• Kitchen and bath remodels

• Basement finishes

• Additions

• Service work

• Small commercial tenant improvements

• Restaurant electrical work

• Retail electrical work



Requirements:



• Strong electrical estimating experience

• Strong knowledge of residential electrical systems

• Strong understanding of NEC/code compliance

• Ability to read blueprints and plans

• Ability to build labor units accurately

• Strong material knowledge

• Strong communication skills

• High attention to detail

• Ability to work independently

• Ability to meet deadlines



Software experience (strong plus):



• ServiceTitan

• Microsoft Excel

• Bluebeam Revu

• PlanSwift

• STACK Construction Technologies

• Accubid Classic

• McCormick Estimating



Bonus if you have:



• Your own estimating software

• Your own takeoff tools

• Existing supplier relationships

• Home service estimating experience

• Electrical contracting background



Compensation:



$900–$2,500/month depending on:

• experience

• speed

• accuracy

• win rate

• profitability of bids



To apply, send:



• Resume

• Sample estimate(s) you’ve built

• Software you use

• Types of electrical projects you’ve estimated

• Estimated monthly output

• Bid win history

In-House Credit Repair | US Funding Company | Remote – Philippines



About the Role

We are an established US-based funding company building our in-house credit repair division. We are looking for an experienced Credit Repair Specialist to be one of the first hires on this team. Strong performers will be promoted to lead the credit repair team as we scale.

This is a long-term, full-time position. Not a project. Not a trial. We want someone we can grow with.

Call credit bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies directly to file and follow up on disputes

Use Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, or similar software

Excellent written and spoken US English

Confident, professional phone voice

Stable role inside an established US company





How to Apply

Your resume

title: Operations and Systems Virtual Assistant (Go High Level + Google Workspace + AI Productivity Expert)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Must be available to start immediately.



We are hiring a high-performance Administrative Assistant with advanced experience in Go High Level (GHL), Google Workspace, and digital business systems.



This is NOT a basic VA role.

You will be expected to work quickly, accurately, and independently across multiple systems daily.



You must be confident handling funnels, CRM, automations, spreadsheets, document formatting, and digital operations without constant guidance.



You will be expected to create and manage structured spreadsheets similar to the examples provided.

See attached sample Google Sheets for the level of work required.



This is a long-term, full-time position with growth opportunities for the right person.



PAY & SCHEDULE

Starting at $3.75/hour



1. Full-time (8 hours/day, 40 hours/week)

2. Must work U.S. EST hours

3. Must be available to start immediately

4. Pay increases based on performance, speed, accuracy, and reliability



WORK REQUIREMENTS:

2. You must submit a screenshot of your internet speed (upload/download)

3. You must be responsive and available throughout your shift



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:

STRUCTURE & DATA CONTROL



1. Move, reorder, and restructure columns and rows quickly

2. Insert, delete, hide, and group columns/rows

3. Split and combine data across columns

4. Copy/paste data without breaking formatting

5. Clean and reorganize large datasets efficiently



?



FORMATTING & LAYOUT



1. Apply consistent formatting across entire sheets

2. Align and space data properly

3. Use color systems to organize information clearly

4. Maintain clean, professional layout at all times



?



TOOLS & FEATURES (YOU MUST KNOW ALL OF THESE)



1. Data validation (drop-down menus)

2. Conditional formatting (rules + color coding)

3. Freeze rows and columns

4. Filter views and sorting (without breaking data)

5. Basic formulas (SUM, COUNT, IF)

6. Text formatting inside cells

7. Column resizing and layout optimization



?



SPEED + EXECUTION



1. You must be able to complete tasks quickly and accurately

2. You must be able to handle multiple sheets at once

3. You must be able to follow instructions and execute without confusion



Go High Level (GHL)

2. Managing CRM (contacts, pipelines, tags, opportunities)

3. Setting up automations, workflows, triggers, follow-ups

4.
 + SMS campaigns

Google Workspace (EXPERT LEVEL REQUIRED)

5. Creating drop-downs (data validation)

8. Maintaining clean, structured layouts across multiple sheets



Google Docs

3. Creating organized, readable layouts



Google Drive



1. Advanced folder organization systems

DIGITAL OPERATIONS

2. E-signature documents (contracts, forms, agreements)

CONTENT + MEDIA

AI TOOLS (REQUIRED DAILY USE)

Use ChatGPT or similar tools to:

You must already be comfortable using AI tools in your workflow.

title: Senior SEO Specialist – Local & Content
description:
Important: Do not apply through OnlineJobs.ph messaging. To be considered, you must apply through the link below and complete the video interview.



Heads up before you go further: a video application is required to be considered.



We'll explain it in detail at the bottom, but here's the short version: this is a high-investment role and we filter hard. Resume + a short video interview through HireFlix. Both required. No video, no consideration.



???? Start your video application here: 
 ????



Who this is for



This role is for the SEO who's tired of building strategies that get watered down by committee, tired of waiting three months for someone to approve a content brief, tired of doing great work that gets buried inside a giant agency client roster.



You'll work directly with the founder. When you spot an opportunity, you can act on it. When you have a strong opinion about how something should be done, you'll be heard. The work you ship in your first 90 days will visibly move the business, and you'll be able to point to specific pages, specific links, and specific rankings and say "I did that."



If you want a role where you can put your head down, build a real content engine from scratch, and watch it compound month over month, this is it. If you want to manage other SEOs or sit in strategy meetings all day, this isn't.



About us



We're a residential plumbing company based in Orange County, California. We've built a strong brand serving homeowners across Southern California, and we're investing heavily in organic growth. This role is a key part of that investment.



What this role is



We're hiring a Senior SEO Specialist to own our content and link building strategy in-house. You'll be the SEO expert in the room, and you'll be expected to know more than the people you report to. We don't want someone we have to train. We want someone who's going to teach us things and push us to be better.



We are bringing this work in-house, which means no agency layer between you and the founder. You'll work directly with our CMO, our founder, and our Senior Web Developer to drive organic traffic, improve local rankings, and build a content engine that compounds over time.



How you work with the team



This role does not operate in isolation. You're one half of a tight in-house pair built specifically to scale our organic growth.



Senior Web Developer: Your closest day-to-day collaborator. They own the technical surface (page builds, performance, schema implementation, site architecture, GTM, GA4, Search Console error resolution). You own the strategy and the content that goes on the pages they build. Daily Slack collaboration, a weekly working session, and a clean handoff process for everything that touches both surfaces.



CMO: Strategic alignment, content priorities, performance review. You'll have a weekly working session with the CMO.



Founder: Direct communication when needed. The founder is engaged with this work, not buried two layers up.



What you'll own



Content production at scale. Researching, writing, and optimizing 4 to 6 publish-ready pieces per week, scaling to 6 to 8 once you're dialed in. This includes blog posts, service pages, location pages, and campaign landing pages. AI-assisted production is expected. We use Claude for drafting from briefs you build. You own the brief, the structure, the editorial review, and final QA. Pure AI-drafted content does not ship without your review.



Link building, full ownership. This is your domain end to end. Outreach, guest posting, digital PR, broken link building, HARO, manufacturer dealer pages, local sponsorships, competitor link gap analysis. You own the strategy, the targets, the outreach, the follow-up, and the reporting on what landed.



Content and on-page SEO strategy. Keyword research, topical authority building, content refreshes, content gap identification, competitor positioning. You set the editorial calendar.



Internal linking strategy. You own what links to what, anchor text, topical clusters, and content interconnection. The web developer owns the technical implementation and architecture that makes it scale.



Schema strategy. You d
 what schema types we need, what fields, and what content goes in. The web developer handles JSON-LD implementation, structured data testing, and deployment. You review and confirm before it ships.



Local SEO. Location page strategy, citation management, NAP consistency, Local Pack ranking factors, and competitive positioning in our core OC markets. Google Business Profile execution currently sits with our marketing coordinator. As you ramp, GBP strategy and oversight will migrate to this role. Expect to absorb GBP within the first 90 days.



Strategic and content SEO audits. Link profile, content gaps, competitor positioning, on-page performance, topical authority. Technical issues you identify get flagged to the web developer for implementation. You're not expected to fix them yourself, but you should be able to identify them clearly enough that the developer can act.



Search Console analysis and reporting. Strategic interpretation of GSC data: query trends, ranking diagnostics, content gap identification, page-level performance. The developer owns error resolution and indexation issues. You own what the data is telling us about the business and what to do about it.



Performance reporting. Reporting is core to this role, not an afterthought. We need a clear weekly pulse and a substantive monthly read on the program.



Weekly tactical update (every Monday):



What shipped (pages, content, links earned)

Outreach status 
s sent, responses, links pending)

Ranking movement worth flagging (wins, drops, opportunities)

Anything blocking or pending decision

Plan for the coming week

Format: short. 5 to 10 minutes to read. Async in Slack or shared doc.



Monthly strategic review (first week of each month):



Organic traffic and engagement trends, month-over-month and year-over-year

Search visibility (click, impression, CTR, average position trends, plus query-level shifts)

Local Pack performance by city (rank tracking across our core OC markets)

Domain authority and backlink growth (DR, referring domains, new and lost links, competitive positioning)

Content output and performance (pages published, top performers, content that needs refresh)

Link building results (links earned, sub-track breakdown, outreach metrics)

Competitor movement (what our key OC competitors are doing that we should respond to)

Strategic recommendations (what to double down on, what to kill, what to test)



We are not handing you a template. A senior SEO knows how they want to present data better than any template can specify. What we will require is that every monthly report contains the sections above. Beyond that, the structure, visualizations, and commentary are yours. We will review your first monthly report together and lock the format from there.



What you need to have



4+ years of hands-on SEO experience for B2C businesses. Home services experience is a big plus. We're not interested in B2B SaaS or enterprise SEO backgrounds.

Hands-on experience across the SEO reporting stack. You've used the major tools daily (GA4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, BrightLocal, or equivalents). We're still finalizing our stack, so you should be tool-fluent rather than tool-dependent.

Proven link building experience. Real campaigns, real outreach, real results you can show us.

Content production at volume. You've personally researched, briefed, and edited 4+ pieces of publish-ready content per week. AI-assisted is fine. We expect it. What we don't accept is unreviewed AI output shipping as final.

Local SEO fundamentals. Google Business Profile, citation management, NAP consistency, location page strategy, Local Pack ranking factors. You know the local SEO playbook cold.

Strong written English. This is non-negotiable. You'll be writing content that homeowners read and editing AI-drafted content to a publish-ready standard.

Experience working Pacific Time Zone hours from wherever you're based. We're not interested in candidates who plan to flip their schedule for this role.

Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and the ability to be on camera for tea
etings.



A note on how we work



This is a 100% remote role. We don't use monitoring software and we don't micromanage. We trust our team to do excellent work and communicate proactively when something is off track.



That trust runs both ways. We expect you to show up, take ownership, and operate with high integrity. If you need help, ask. If you're stuck, say so. If you're ahead of schedule, find the next thing. We're hiring an adult, and we'll treat you like one.



This role is full-time. Not a side gig, not a weekend project, not something you stack with three other clients. Your full attention during business hours is part of what we're paying for.



Communication rhythm:



Daily async updates in Slack: what you shipped, what you're working on, anything blocking

Weekly working session with the CMO

Weekly working session with the Senior Web Developer to coordinate on schema, internal linking, page builds, and technical issues

We over-communicate by default. Silence is a flag, not a feature.



Decision authority:



We want you to ship without asking permission for things you should be empowered to ship.



What you can ship without approval: content briefs, on-page optimization, internal linking decisions, link building outreach, schema strategy recommendations, content calendar decisions, AI-assisted drafts that you've reviewed.

What needs CMO or founder approval: major topical pivots, link building budget commitments above $250 per item, sponsorships, paid placements, brand voice changes, anything that contradicts existing strategy documents.

Always loop in the developer on: schema specs before implementation, internal linking changes, page-level technical needs, anything affecting URL structure.



Hours and compensation



Full-time, 100% remote

Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM to 5:00 PM Pacific Time

One-hour lunch and two 10-minute breaks

$2,000 to $3,500 USD per month, depending on experience

Independent contractor role, paid through our global payroll partner

Reports to: CMO and Founder



Start date: Immediate



How to apply



We're filtering hard on this role. Generic applications will be ignored.



To be considered, you must submit both:



Your resume through this BambooHR posting

A short video interview through our HireFlix link



The video is short, four questions, about 15 minutes from your phone or laptop. A real person watches every video. No bots, no AI screening.



???? Start your video application here: 
 ????



Applications without a completed video will not be reviewed. Resume alone is not enough.



If you're a finalist, we'll ask you for a custom screen-share video walking through your actual SEO workflow. That's the deep dive. The HireFlix video is the gate.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA / DIGITAL MEDIA / MARKETING / GROWTH CATALYSTS
description:

We move fast, and we expect consistent execution.



---



### ???? Pay:



$1,200 for 3 weeks (fixed sprint contract)



---



### ???? VERY IMPORTANT (How to Apply):

title: Supply Chain Associate (Amazon)
description:
Zoyava (www.zoyava.co) is positioned to establish itself as a leading digital-native brand, rapidly growing its market presence. Our dedication to delivering top-notch, user-friendly supplements exclusively on Amazon underscores our commitment to unparalleled quality and an exceptional customer experience across all operations. We firmly believe that each employee's contribution is absolutely indispensable to driving our company's advancement and success.



Who we’re looking for:



We’re currently looking for a Supply Chain Associate to join our team. This role is crucial for ensuring the efficient and effective management of our supply chain operations, particularly focusing on our Amazon FBA logistics, procurement processes, and inventory management. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record of creating shipments and labels for Amazon FBA, alongside extensive experience in procurement, including supplier communications, negotiations, and purchase order placement. If you are organized, possess strong communication skills, and are capable of maintaining a well-structured digital filing system, we would love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities & Duties:



- Handle all elements of Amazon FBA logistics, such as creating shipments, generating labels, and ensuring compliance with Amazon's policies and procedures.

- Conduct procurement activities, including supplier sourcing, negotiation, and purchase order placement. Ensure cost-effective procurement while maintaining quality standards.

- Establish efficient communication channels with suppliers to monitor order progress, address any issues, and oversee supplier partnerships.

- Effectively monitor and control inventory levels to meet demand and avoid unnecessary overstocking. Employ inventory management software to accurately track stock movements and accurately predict future requirements.

- Maintain the company's digital filing system with meticulous organization, ensuring all supplier-related documents and paperwork are accurately filed and easily accessible.



Requirements, Skills & Qualification:



- 3-5 years of FBA shipment experience

- Logistics experience creating and coordinating shipments

- Warehouse/3PL order submission and reconciliation experience

- Must have hands-on experience creating shipments and labels for Amazon FBA. The candidate should be familiar with Amazon Seller Central and have a solid understanding of FBA requirements and procedures.

- Procurement and Supplier Management: Demonstrated experience in procurement, including direct communication with suppliers, negotiation skills, and effective placement of purchase orders. The ability to build and maintain positive relationships with suppliers is essential.

- Strong proficiency in using cloud storage services (e.g., Google Drive) for document management.

- Effective verbal and written communication skills crucial for dealing with suppliers, internal teams, and managing documentation.

- Ability to manage and track inventory levels, ensuring stock availability and minimizing overstock situations. Experience with inventory software and forecasting tools is preferred.

- Attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously are key.

- Available to work in EST 



What We Offer:



- A dynamic and supportive work environment in a fast-growing company. We are dedicated to partnering with career-driven individuals in search of stable, fulfilling employment opportunities.

- We offer an attractive salary and comprehensive benefits package to ensure that our employees are well-compensated and rewarded for their hard work.

- Unlimited Paid Time Off

- HMO (Medicard) 

- Opportunities for advancing your professional growth and development.



This is a remote position which requires you to have an active and fast internet connection and a personal computer or a laptop. If you meet the above criteria, please apply thru this link:




/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSer_dBdXnMcVnx-9GmQdaJOfeKnQT5LMQTyuOOnZnMHYf8wxQ/viewform

title: Website Designer (CSS-Focused)
description:
We’re looking for a Website Designer with strong CSS skills who can turn ideas into clean, high-converting web pages.



This is not just about making things “look good.”



It’s about designing pages that are:

???? Clear

???? Fast

???? Easy to navigate

???? Built to convert



If you understand how layout, spacing, and structure influence user behavior… this role is for you.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Doing

• Design and build landing pages and website sections using HTML & CSS 

• Improve existing pages for better user experience and conversion 

• Structure pages for mobile-first performance 

• Translate ideas, wireframes, or rough concepts into clean designs 

• Ensure consistency across branding, spacing, and layout 

• Work with marketing/content to align design with messaging 

________________________________________

What We’re Looking For

• Strong experience with CSS (layout, spacing, responsiveness, positioning) 

• Comfortable working with HTML structure 

• Understanding of mobile-first design 

• Ability to create clean, modern, and simple layouts 

• Attention to detail (alignment, spacing, consistency) 

• Ability to take direction and iterate quickly 

________________________________________

Bonus (Not Required)

• Experience with landing page builders (GoHighLevel, Webflow, etc.) 

• Understanding of conversion-focused design 

• Basic knowledge of JavaScript 

• Experience working with marketing teams 

________________________________________

What We DON’T Want

• Overly complex or flashy designs that hurt usability 

• Designers who ignore mobile experience 

• “Template-only” designers who can’t customize 

• Poor attention to spacing, alignment, or structure 

________________________________________

What Success Looks Like

• Pages are clean, fast, and easy to understand 

• Designs guide users naturally toward action 

• Mobile experience feels just as good (or better) than desktop 

• Improvements lead to better engagement and conversions 

________________________________________

Why Join Us

• Work on real projects that impact business results 

• Clear direction and feedback (no guessing) 

• Opportunity to grow into a long-term design role 

• Be part of a team focused on performance, not fluff 

________________________________________

How to Apply

Add all to one reviewable link and place "WD_CSS" in the title block to show you read the whole post to be considered .

If you understand that good design isn’t decoration—it’s communication and conversion…

We want to work with you.

description:
We are a car dealership hiring a full-time Appointment Setter to work our warm leads and get customers to show up to our showroom. This is a stable, long-term remote position.



You will contact people who are already interested in buying a car, show them vehicles online via video or photos, answer their questions, and book them for an in-person visit. No cold calling — these are warm leads.



YOUR DAILY TASKS:

- Call, text, and message leads to follow up on their interest

- Show cars online using photos, videos, or live video walkarounds

- Answer basic questions about pricing, availability, and features

- Book confirmed appointments and log them in our system

- Send reminders so customers actually show up

- Keep your lead tracker updated daily



YOU ARE A GREAT FIT IF YOU:

- Have excellent spoken and written English

- Have experience in sales, telemarketing, or BPO (outbound preferred)

- Are confident, friendly, and persuasive on the phone

- Have a reliable internet connection (20 Mbps+) and a headset

- Are punctual, honest, and take ownership of your results

- Can work during North American business hours



COMPENSATION:

- $3–$5/hr USD depending on experience

- Bonus per showed appointment — we reward performance

- Direct hire, long-term position

.

title: Medical Biller
description:
Medical Biller (Dermatology & Oculoplastics – Remote)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: US business hours (Eastern Time preferred)

Pay: Competitive, based on experience

About Us

We are a physician-owned medical practice in the United States specializing in dermatology, Mohs surgery, and oculoplastic surgery. We are a fast-growing, high-quality clinic focused on excellent patient care and efficient operations.

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced Medical Biller with strong knowledge of US medical billing to manage claims, reduce denials, and improve collections. Experience with procedural and surgical billing is highly preferred.

Key Responsibilities

Submit accurate and timely insurance claims (CMS-1500)

Review and verify CPT, ICD-10, and modifiers

Handle billing for dermatology (visits, biopsies, excisions), Mohs surgery (17311–17315), repairs and closures, and oculoplastic procedures (blepharoplasty, lesion removals, etc.)

Post payments and reconcile accounts

Follow up on denied, rejected, and unpaid claims

Work insurance AR and aging reports

Identify patterns in denials and suggest improvements

Communicate with insurance companies (phone and portals)

Ensure compliance with US billing regulations

Required Experience

2+ years of US medical billing experience

Strong knowledge of CPT, ICD-10, and modifiers (-25, -59, -79, etc.)

Experience with claims submission and denial management

Experience with Medicare and commercial payers

Ability to work independently and manage workload

Strongly Preferred

Experience in dermatology and/or Mohs surgery billing

Experience with oculoplastic surgery billing (not general ophthalmology)

Understanding of global periods and surgical packages

Experience with high-value procedural claims

Experience with EMR systems (Modernizing Medicine / EMA is a plus)

Requirements

Excellent attention to detail

Strong English communication skills

Reliable high-speed internet

Quiet, professional work environment

Ability to work during US business hours

What Success Looks Like

Clean claims with low denial rates

Fast follow-up on unpaid claims

Improved collections and reduced AR days

Organized and proactive communication

How to Apply

Please include:

Your resume

A short summary of your medical billing experience

Your experience with dermatology, Mohs, or oculoplastics billing

Your internet speed

Your expected hourly rate

Include the phrase “CLEAN CLAIMS FIRST” in your application so we know you read this post.

Why Join Us

Stable, long-term role

Work with a high-level US specialty clinic

Opportunity to grow and take ownership of billing

title: Senior Full-Stack TypeScript Developer (CRM System)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack TypeScript Developer to take ownership of a production-grade, custom-built CRM platform used in the mortgage industry.



This is a high-complexity system with multiple portals, deep backend architecture, and strict compliance/security requirements. The ideal candidate will manage, maintain, and improve the system, working alongside the current US-based developer for onboarding.



This is not a junior or mid-level role — seniority is critical due to the system’s complexity and risk exposure. 

 

System Overview

• 3 Core Portals: 

o Client Portal 

o Employee/Staff Portal 

o Referral/Partner Portal 

• Additional: Public lead funnel 

• Tech Stack: 

o Frontend: Next.js 15 / React 18 

o Backend: NestJS (TypeScript) 

o Database: PostgreSQL / Supabase (with RLS) 

o Queue System: BullMQ / Redis 

• Scale: 350K+ lines of code (enterprise-level system) 

• Integrations: SendGrid, Twilio, Gmail, Google Calendar, RingCentral, AWS Bedrock, etc. 

 

Key Responsibilities

• Maintain and manage the full CRM system across all portals 

• Take ownership of an existing large codebase (not greenfield) 

• Troubleshoot bugs and ensure system stability 

• Implement new features and enhancements 

• Manage and update third-party integrations 

• Handle database migrations and ensure data security 

• Monitor background jobs (BullMQ) and system performance 

• Work within existing architecture (no unnecessary rewrites) 

 

Non-Negotiable Requirements

• Senior-level experience (MUST) – no junior or mid-level candidates 

• Strong TypeScript (strict mode) experience 

• Proven experience with NestJS (not just Node/Express) 

• Experience with Next.js (App Router, SSR) 

• Strong PostgreSQL + Supabase (especially Row-Level Security / RLS) 

• Experience managing large, existing production codebases 

• Familiarity with BullMQ / Redis job queues 

• Experience with API integrations 
, SMS, CRM tools, etc.) 

• Strong understanding of system architecture and security best practices 

• Ability to communicate clearly and work autonomously 

 

Ideal Candidate Profile

• Has taken over and maintained a large, complex system built by others 

• Understands risk in modifying security layers (especially RLS) 

• Strong problem solver with production-level debugging experience 

• Comfortable working in async / remote environments 

• Uses AI tools effectively in development workflows (preferred) 



How to apply:

Please send your

1. Updated resume

2. Portfolio

3. Introduction video about your relevant work experiences

4. A short cover letter why you're the best fit for the role.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Position : Remote Job



We are an expanding U.S.-based luxury cleaning company focused on building efficient, long-term systems and structured processes. We’re seeking a versatile Virtual Assistant who is highly organized, detail-focused, proactive, and open to learning new tools and workflows over time.

This is a long-term opportunity for someone who enjoys working with structure, documentation, research, and continuously improving systems.

Key Responsibilities

1. Document Management & Administration

Maintain and organize internal documents such as employee forms, agreements, SOPs, and on boarding materials. Create clear and logical folder structures using platforms like Google Drive or Dropbox, ensuring all files are properly labeled, version-controlled, and easy to locate.

2. SOP & Process Creation

Review provided YouTube content related to professional and luxury cleaning. Identify key steps, tools, and techniques, then convert them into clear, well-structured written SOPs and checklists (including deep cleaning and specialized services). Continuously refine and improve these documents over time.

3. Platform & Systems Support (Training Provided)

Learn to work with Booking Koala and assist in setting up and optimizing the platform. Ensure services, pricing structures, and descriptions align with the company’s website. Document workflows to support future tea
mbers. (No prior experience required—willingness to learn is key.)

4. Market & Competitor Research

Conduct research on competitors within the cleaning and luxury service industry. Analyze and summarize their pricing, service offerings, and market positioning, providing clear written insights rather than just links.

5. Social Media Management

Set up and manage social media accounts (such as Instagram and TikTok). Re purpose ideas from existing content, create captions, hashtags, and posting schedules, and ensure consistent posting aligned with brand guidelines.

Required Skills & Qualities



Strong written English skills



Excellent attention to detail



Highly organized and process-oriented



Comfortable learning new tools and systems



Ability to follow instructions accurately



Proactive communication and thoughtful questioning



Dependable with consistent availability



Fluent in English.

title: Experienced VSL Video Editor — $1,000/Month + Bonuses
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- $1,000 USD/month, paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Direct training from a team that has generated over 8 figures in revenue

- Clear growth path for top performers

- Young, high-performance international team



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will create high-converting Video Sales Letters (VSLs) and performance-driven video ads.

This is not basic editing.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Edit long-form VSLs that convert viewers into buyers

- Craft compelling hooks that capture attention immediately

- Structure videos for maximum retention and persuasion

- Apply direct-response marketing principles inside your edits

- Improve pacing, storytelling, and emotional impact

- Optimize videos based on feedback and performance

- This role prioritizes conversion psychology and persuasion as much as editing skill.



TASKS



- Edit VSLs and paid ads based on provided scripts

- Apply proven conversion frameworks in your edits

- Improve pacing, engagement, and retention

- Refine videos based on performance feedback

- Ensure clean audio, strong visuals, and professional finishing

- Deliver projects on time and communicate clearly



Note: Additional performance-related tasks may be assigned as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Strong English communication skills (C1 or above preferred)

- Strong understanding of sales psychology and persuasion

- Previous experience editing VSLs or direct-response ads

- Ability to structure edits for conversions, not just aesthetics

- Detail-oriented with high standards

- Open to feedback and continuous improvement

- Reliable, disciplined, and performance-driven



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/N384n8RG



Important note: Put “VSL” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



ROUND 2: Paid test task.



MORE ABOUT US

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

Drop pre-recorded voi
s when prospects don't answer to maximize callback rates

title: Ecommerce Team Lead -
description:

Part-Time to Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term



About the Company



HouseSensationsArt is a U.S.-based e-commerce and manufacturing brand specializing in custo
tal décor, signage, and personalized products.



We operate across multiple platforms including Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, eBay, and TikTok Shop. As we continue to scale, we are building a strong Philippines-based remote team to support product development, marketing, and operations.



About the Role



We are hiring a highly skilled E-Commerce Manager who understands the full product lifecycle—from concept and design to listing optimization, advertising, and scaling.



This is a leadership role where you will manage a team of 5–7 members across design, listings, and marketing while also executing key tasks when needed.



This is not a basic listing role. You are expected to take ownership of product performance from creation to scaling.

Ensure platform compliance and best practices

Maintain consistent branding across all platforms

Manage and optimize advertising campaigns across:

Amazon PPC

Etsy Ads

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

Google Ads (preferred)

Perform keyword research and competitor analysis

Monitor and optimize metrics such as CTR, CPC, and ROAS

Scale winning products and campaigns



Team Leadership & Management (5–7 Members)



Lead, manage, and mentor designers, listing specialists, and marketing assistants

Assign tasks and track progress using project management tools

Review work for quality, accuracy, and brand consistency

Ensure deadlines are met and workflows are followed

Provide feedback, training, and performance improvement guidance

Ensure daily EOD reports are submitted



Multi-Platform Strategy & Optimization



Manage and sync products across all platforms

Identify top-performing products and scale them

Improve conversion rates through testing and optimization

Analyze data and adjust strategies accordingly



Product Development Support



Assist in creating new product concepts

Understand materials, sizing, and customization options

Coordinate with design and production teams for accuracy

Requirements



Must-Have Skills



Proven experience managing multi-platform e-commerce stores

Experience leading a team (minimum 3+, ideally 5–7 members)

Strong knowledge of:

Etsy SEO

Amazon Seller Central and A+ Content

Shopify product setup

Experience with PPC advertising (Amazon, Etsy, Meta)

Advanced graphic design skills

Ability to create high-converting product listings



Technical Skills



Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator (or equivalent)

Experience with product mockups and image creation

Understanding of branding and conversion-focused design

Familiarity with tools such as:

Canva (optional)

Helium 10 or Jungle Scout (preferred)

Google Analytics



Bonus Skills



Experience with custom products or signage

Knowledge of vector files, laser cutting, or product design workflows

Video editing for short-form content (TikTok, Reels)

Experience with Shopify apps and integrations

Position Details



Hours: 20–30 hours per week (potential to increase to 30–40 hours)

Schedule: Overnight (Philippine Time, aligned with U.S. hours)

Work Setup: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Pay: Starting at $4.00/hour (based on experience), paid weekly via Wise

Work Requirements

Must use TimeProof (with screenshots and activity tracking)

title: Virtual Assistant – Admin, Finance Tracking & Project Support
description:
Balloon & Paper LLC



Position: Virtual Assistant – Admin, Finance Tracking & Project Support

Location: Remote (Graveyard shift aligned to 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Los Angeles, CA (PST)

Compensation: $250/month during 3-month probation, performance-based raise review after Month 3



About the Role



This is a fast-paced, high-responsibility role for someone who can handle administrative support, financial tracking (not accounting), and project coordination without constant supervision. You will be the operational right hand—keeping projects organized, expenses tracked, and workflows running clean.



This is not a casual VA role. You will be working inside live business systems and must be precise, organized, and responsive.



Tools We Use



HoneyBook

ClickUp

WhatsApp & iPhone for daily communication



Responsibilities



Track expenses, vendor invoices, and contractor payments (no accounting or tax work)

Monitor project budgets and flag missing info or overages

Track supplies, rentals, and purchase needs

Manage schedules, task lists, documents, and follow-ups

Support project timelines, reporting, and coordination

Maintain organized records and internal trackers

Identify inefficiencies and suggest workflow improvements



Ideal Candidate



Strong administrative and organizational experience

Experience with project coordination or operations support

Comfortable working with budgets, invoices, and trackers (not doing accounting)

Tech-savvy and fast at learning systems

Excellent English (written and spoken)

Fully available during 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Los Angeles, CA (PST)



DO NOT APPLY IF



You are looking for a light or casual VA role

You cannot commit to the Los Angeles PST time window

You struggle with multitasking or urgency

You need constant step-by-step supervision

You dislike structured systems and accountability



Payment Terms



Paid based on completed, accurate deliverables, not idle time

First 30 days: One payout after successful completion and review

After 30 days: Bi-weekly payouts

Probation pay: $250/month

Performance bonuses and raises available for high performers within 6 months



How to Apply



 subject line:

Virtual Assistant – [Your Name]



Only candidates who follow instructions and include the required 15 Apply Points will be contacted.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Kyri Media — Real Estate Appointment Setter



Apply here: 



Remote $500–$2,000/month + 5% commission ($75 - $225 per close) 7 AM–4 PM EST



About Us



We help real estate agents grow their business through short-form video content. We handle everything — strategy, scripts, editing, posting. Realtors just film. Agents pay us $4,500 every 3 months for the service.



The Role



Call leads. Have real conversations. Book qualified realtors into a strategy call with our CEO. That's it.



You're not closing — you're protecting our CEO's calendar from bad-fit demos.



We're Looking for the Best



This is not a beginner role. We want a top 1% appointment setter — someone who already knows they're great at this and wants to prove it with us.



DO NOT APPLY IF:



You don't have experience with remote sales job like cold calling and appointment setting for at least 2 years.

Your english is not good, we need the best english

You are looking to work part time, or are studying in uni, we are looking for people who are looking for a serious full time job.

You are not great at what you do, this is not a job for beginners, we are looking for experienced people.

The best look like this:



2+ years of cold calling US prospects (B2B, not just inbound BPO)

Clear, calm English that US realtors trust on the phone

"Help, don't sell" mindset — you'd rather book 5 great demos than 15 weak ones

GoHighLevel (or similar CRM) experience

Real estate background is a big plus

Calm under rejection (50 "no"s a day doesn't shake you)

Coachable, detail-oriented, hungry but patient

Great results in your previous roles

Apply here: 



Work Location: Remote

title: HIRING: Ads Launcher (Meta Ads | Facebook & Instagram | Remote | Full-Time)
description:
Who are we?



We’re a fast-growing e-commerce company operating multiple Shopify dropshipping stores across Europe and the US.

As we scale and launch new products and markets, the speed and accuracy of our ad execution becomes critical.



We are now hiring a full-time Ads Launcher whose main responsibility will be launching and managing Meta ads daily inside the Meta Ads platform, following clear instructions, structures, and SOPs.



Who are we looking for?



Someone who is:



Highly organized and execution-focused



Experienced working inside Meta Ads Manager



Comfortable launching ads every day



Able to follow detailed instructions and SOPs exactly



Fast, reliable, and consistent



Comfortable working independently without constant supervision



Detail-oriented when setting up campaigns, ad sets, and ads



Used to repetitive, operational tasks without losing accuracy



This role is not about creative strategy, copywriting, or scaling decisions.

Your focus is clean, accurate, and fast ad launching and structure management.



Your Responsibilities



Launch Meta ads daily 
 & Instagram)



Create and structure campaigns, ad sets, and ads inside Meta Ads Manager



Set budgets, schedules, audiences, and placements as instructed



Upload creatives, copy, headlines, and URLs provided by the team



Double-check all settings before ads go live



Pause, duplicate, or relaunch ads based on instructions



Keep internal trackers updated with launched ads and statuses



Follow internal SOPs for campaign naming, structure, and setup



Report any errors, rejections, or technical issues immediately



Requirements



Proven experience working inside Meta Ads Manager



Hands-on experience launching
 & Instagram ads



High attention to detail (no wrong budgets, links, or audiences)



Comfortable following SOPs and structured workflows



Ability to work full-time, 6 days per week



Comfortable with repetitive execution-based tasks



Strong communication and responsiveness



Basic understanding of e-commerce ads is a plus



Stable internet connection & backup plan



Bonus



Experience working with high-volume ad accounts



Experience launching ads for e-commerce or dropshipping stores



Familiarity with ClickUp, Slack, or Google Sheets



What we offer



100% remote position



Full-time work (160–190 hours/month)



Stable, long-term role



Clear SOPs and structured systems



Fast decision-making environment



Competitive monthly compensation based on experience



How to apply:



Send your application in English with your CV and include the hashtag #ADSLAUNCHER at the end of your message.



Please also answer the following:



How many years of experience do you have working with Meta Ads Manager?



How many ads or campaigns have you launched per day in previous roles?



Have you worked with e-commerce or dropshipping ads before?



Are you comfortable launching ads daily and following strict SOPs?



Do you have stable internet and electricity, and a backup plan?



We are looking for someone fast, accurate, and reliable.

If you enjoy execution-focused work and launching ads daily, we’d love to hear from you.



Looking forward to your application,

ECGA

title: Financial Planning & Analysis with Procurement  experience
description:
We are seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Planning & Analyst professional with procurement experience to support financial planning, budgeting, forecasting, cost optimization, and procurement-related financial operations. The role will work closely with finance, procurement, and business teams to manage budgets, analyze spend patterns, optimize vendor costs, and support strategic financial decision-making.



Key Responsibilities



Financial Planning & Analysis



Prepare annual budgets, financial forecasts, and long-term financial plans

Conduct variance analysis between actuals, budgets, and forecasts

Develop financial models to support business decisions

Monitor profitability, revenue trends, and operational expenses

Prepare monthly MIS reports, dashboards, and financial presentations for leadership

Procurement Financial Management



Partner with procurement teams for vendor budgeting and spend forecasting

Analyze procurement spend and identify cost-saving opportunities

Monitor purchase orders, vendor contracts, and payment schedules

Evaluate procurement costs and support negotiation strategies

Ensure optimal utilization of procurement budgets

Vendor & Contract Analysis



Review vendor agreements from a financial perspective

Track contract renewals, pricing structures, and payment terms

Ensure procurement compliance with internal financial policies

Reporting & Controls



Prepare procurement spend reports for management review

Ensure data accuracy and financial control measures

Support internal/external audits related to procurement spending

Cross-functional Collaboration



Work closely with Finance, Procurement, Operations, and Leadership teams

Support strategic initiatives involving cost planning and procurement decisions

Required Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Commerce, Economics, Supply Chain, or related field

MBA Finance / CA / CMA preferred

Experience



3–8 years of experience in Financial Planning & Analysis, Procurement Finance, Strategic Sourcing, or related roles

Required Skills



Financial planning and forecasting

Procurement budgeting

Spend analysis

Cost optimization

Financial modeling

Advanced Excel

ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite, etc.)

Power BI / Tableau (preferred)

Vendor management understanding

Strong negotiation support skills

Key KPIs



Budget accuracy

Forecast accuracy

Procurement savings achieved

Vendor cost optimization

Reporting accuracy and timeliness



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: Business Development Executive
description:
Company Description

MERRIA Digital is a growing digital marketing and creative agency based in Singapore. We help SMEs improve their online presence through strategic marketing, social media management, and digital campaigns that generate real business growth.



Our focus is to support businesses in industries such as home services, contractors, and SMEs looking to strengthen their digital presence and attract more customers.



We are currently looking for a Business Development Executive to support our sales and lead generation activities.



Role Overview

The Business Development Assistant will support the company's growth by identifying potential clients, conducting outreach, and scheduling meetings with prospective businesses in Singapore.



This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, and interested in sales, marketing, or business development.



The primary goal of this role is to build a consistent pipeline of potential clients and schedule appointments for the Business Development Manager to present the company's services.



This is a full time role (40 hours per week) with flexible working arrangement.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation

Research and identify potential SME clients across various industries.

Build and maintain a database of qualified leads.



Appointment Setting

Schedule meetings between potential clients and Business Development Manager.

Coordinate availability and manage meeting calendars.



Follow-Ups

Send follow-up messages to prospects.

Maintain communication with interested leads.



CRM & Reporting

Track all leads, outreach activities, and responses in CRM system.

Provide weekly reports.



Sales Support

Assist with business development initiatives and client acquisition support.



Requirements

Strong communication skills

Organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable with online research and outreach

Basic knowledge of digital marketing is a plus

Experience in sales, marketing, or lead generation is an advantage but not required

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively



Why Join MERRIA Digital

Opportunity to work with growing digital marketing agency

Gain experience in business development and digital marketing

Flexible working arrangement

Potential long-term opportunity as the company expands



How to Apply

Interested candidates may send their CV along with short introduction to 
 line: Application - Business Development Assistant

description:

We’re looking for a motivated and consistent Lead Generation Cold Caller to join our team. This role is focused on outbound prospecting, initiating conversations with potential clients, and setting up qualified opportunities for our sales team.

title: FACEBOOK ADS SPECIALIST – BEYOND THE CAMPAIGN SETUP
description:
Most people see a 
 Ads Specialist" as someone who simply pushes buttons and monitors budgets. We are looking for something different. We are looking for a strategic thinker who understands that every dollar spent is an investment, and every data point tells a story.



WHY JOIN US?

Performance-Driven Budget: We do not limit your creativity. Your budget is limited only by your ability to scale and optimize.



Data-Centric Culture: We value hard numbers over "gut feelings." You will have the tools and the freedom to make decisions based on real-time metrics.



The "Test and Learn" Philosophy: We encourage calculated risks. You have the autonomy to experiment with bold targeting strategies and unconventional creatives to find the winning formula.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

Campaign Architecture: Build multi-stage advertising funnels from awareness and consideration to high-intent conversion.



Deep-Dive Optimization: Look beyond CTR. You will analyze CR, ROAS, and LTV to refine and pivot strategies.



Creative Collaboration: Work closely with Content and Design teams to develop "scroll-stopping" ads that resonate with target audiences.



Technical Command: Manage ad accounts, oversee Pixel and API configurations, and proactively navigate
’s algorithmic shifts.



THE IDEAL CANDIDATE

Experience: At least 1-2 years of hands-on experience with
 Ads, preferably managing high-spend accounts.



A/B Testing Mindset: An innate curiosity to constantly ask "Why?" and a dedication to iterative improvement.



Consumer Psychology: A deep understanding of what triggers a user to stop scrolling and take action.

Subject line: [FB ADS] – FULL NAME – PHONE NUMBER

title: Virtual Assistant Appointment Setter
description:

Follow up with all unresponsive leads (call + text +

 / Instagram)

Basic spreadsheets

title: Experienced Cold Caller for Home Improvement / Construction/ Remodeling (Appointment Setter)
description:

What you’ll do

Pay

• $5 bonus per qualified appointment (must be real + confirmed)

• $50 bonus per closed sale (paid when the deal closes)



What we’re looking for

• Proven cold-calling experience (required)

• Strong English + confident phone presence

• Reliable internet + quiet workspace

Schedule

If you don’t have real cold-calling experience, don’t have home improvement / construction-related experience, can’t work 9–5 PST, or aren’t comfortable sending a short voice sample later in the process, please don’t apply. This role is performance-based and we’re only moving forward with experienced callers — so we don’t waste your time or ours.

title: Documentary Video Editor — Music & Film YouTube Channel
description:
I'm launching a YouTube channel publishing long-form documentaries on subjects in the music, internet culture and film world — deep dives, video essays, and historical features in the spirit of Volksgeist, Patrick (CC), and Fern.



I write the scripts and record the voiceover. I'm looking for an editor who can take it from there and deliver finished documentaries from rough script + VO to publish-ready cut.



What you'll do

• Cut long-form video essays / documentaries (typically 10–30 min)

• Source archival footage, B-roll, photos, and film clips that fit each script

• Build motion graphics, title cards, lower thirds, and animated visualizations in After Effects

• Pace visuals tightly to the narration — cuts, on-screen text, music hits

• Color and audio polish



You're a fit if you have

• A reel or 2–3 examples of documentary / video-essay editing

• Strong After Effects motion graphics (non-negotiable)

• Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve fluency

• A real eye for typography, pacing, and cinematic feel

• Skill at digging up archival footage and photos

• Familiarity with the reference channels above (or channels in that lane)



Bonus

• Interest in music history, film history, or pop culture

• Sound design / mixing chops

• Long-form YouTube experience (not just commercial or short-form)



This is an ongoing relationship rather than one-off gigs — a regular release cadence with one editor I trust. Open to per-video flat rates or hourly.



When you apply, please send a reel and a quick note on which of the reference channels resonates most with you and why.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant — Good & Tasteful Agency



About Us

Good & Tasteful is a social media marketing and content agency specializing in the restaurant industry. We work with restaurant clients across the Atlanta area to create high-quality video and photo content, run paid ad campaigns, and build their brand presence online. We move fast, we care about quality, and we're growing.



Role Overview

We're looking for a highly organized, proactive Executive Assistant to support our agency owner and help keep our client projects running smoothly every month. This is not a traditional assistant role — you'll be the operational backbone of the agency, making sure nothing falls through the cracks so our owner can stay focused on strategy and growth.



What You'll Do



Project Management

- Manage monthly content projects for each restaurant client from start to finish

- Track deliverables, deadlines, and project status across all active clients

- Organize and maintain our project management system (Notion) so everything is always up to date

- Make sure shoots, edits, and approvals stay on schedule every month



Client Communication

- Send videos and photos to clients for review and approval

- Follow up with clients on feedback and keep approvals moving efficiently

- Handle professional written communication with clients on behalf of the agency



Team Coordination

- Communicate tasks and deadlines to editors and videographers

- Coordinate file handoffs between the video team and editing team via 

- Keep the team informed so everyone knows what's due and when



Administrative Support

- Handle day-to-day administrative tasks to take the load off the agency owner

- Assist with organizing documents, SOPs, reports, and internal files

- Help prepare client-facing materials and monthly deliverable packages

- Support onboarding of new clients by organizing intake information and setting up project folders



What We're Looking For

- Strong organizational skills — you thrive on structure and keeping things in order

- Excellent written communication — you can represent the agency professionally with clients

- Experience with project management tools (Notion, Trello, Asana, or similar)

- Ability to manage multiple clients and deadlines simultaneously without dropping the ball

- Self-starter who doesn't need to be micromanaged

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced creative environment

- Experience in a marketing, media, or creative agency is a plus

- Familiarity with tools like 
, Slack, or Meta Business Suite is a bonus



What to Expect

- Remote position

- You'll be working closely with the agency owner, editors, and videographers

- Fast-paced environment — restaurant clients have monthly content cycles and things move quickly

- Room to grow as the agency scales



If you're someone who loves keeping things organized, communicates clearly, and wants to be a key part of a growing creative agency — we want to hear from you.

?

?

?

?



Pay:

?

title: HVAC Admin & Operations Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a reliable HVAC Operations Coordinator to take ownership of key back-office and coordination tasks that currently sit with busy managers. This role exists to improve the flow of communication between the office and site teams, keep approvals and paperwork moving, and ensure projects stay organized.





Key Responsibilities



Create and manage purchase orders (POs) and maintain procurement tracking.

Coordinate invoice processing and support approvals (including chasing missing information and sign-offs).

Assist with subcontractor administration, including tracking and assessing progress claims and required documentation.

Maintain and distribute updated drawings (version control, drawing registers, ensuring the right people have the latest set).

Coordinate site deliveries and follow up on proof of delivery / delivery dockets; chase site team confirmations and approvals.

Submit required deliverables to clients and keep document packs organised.

Support the Design Manager and Construction Managers with scheduling, follow-ups, and internal coordination.

Act as the “communication bridge” between office, site, and subcontractors to prevent delays and missed approvals.





Skills & Qualifications



With experience in HVAC industry (Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning)

Experience in construction administration / project admin / operations coordination (residential or commercial).

Strong competence with documentation, workflow tracking, and follow-ups (high attention to detail).

Comfortable handling POs, invoices, subcontractor paperwork, and document registers.

Clear written communication and confidence chasing approvals professionally (office + site environments).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage multiple moving tasks without dropping details.

Proficiency with common tools (e.g., Google Workspace/Microsoft Office, spreadsheets,
, and basic project trackers).





Ideal Candidate



Comfortable working with construction teams and can communicate clearly with both office staff and site managers.

Strong follow-through: able to close loops on approvals, dockets, invoices, and paperwork.

Systematic and process-minded (brings structure, improves how info flows, keeps records clean).

Interested in a long-term role where they become a dependable part of client's operations engine.





Work Setup: Remote



Work Schedule: Day Shift (AU)

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:

Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

title: Genealogist / Heir Researcher
description:
We're a U.S.-based real estate investment company specializing in distressed and probate-related properties. We're looking for a skilled genealogist to help us identify and trace rightful heirs on properties tied up in intestate estates, probate, and unclear ownership chains.

What you'll do



Trace heirs for U.S. real estate (primarily North Carolina and Texas, with occasional research in other states)

Build accurate, verifiable family trees from public records, ancestry databases, vital records, obituaries, and court filings

Review probate dockets, court records, and legal filings to determine succession under intestacy laws

Produce clean, well-organized case summaries that document your sources and reasoning

Cross-check title history and ownership records to confirm the chain of heirship

Work closely with our acquisitions team to prioritize leads and turn research around quickly



What we're looking for



2+ years of hands-on genealogy and heir-tracing experience, ideally tied to estates or real estate

Strong working knowledge of U.S. ancestry records (Ancestry, FamilySearch, 
, county vital records, etc.)

Solid understanding of U.S. intestacy laws and how heirship is determined when there's no will — bonus if you've worked specifically in NC or TX

Comfort reading and interpreting probate filings, deeds, and other court documents

Detail-obsessed — you verify before you report, and you cite your sources

Clear written communication; your case summaries should be easy for a non-genealogist to follow



Nice to have



Experience with title searches and chain-of-title research

Familiarity with property comping or basic real estate valuation

Prior work supporting legal, real estate, or investigative teams



The role

Part-time, remote, contract-based to start. Hours flex with caseload, with room to grow into more consistent work for the right person. Pay based on experience and per-case complexity.

To apply

Send a short note about your background, a sample case summary or redacted family tree you've built, and your rate expectations.
