title: SDR Cold Email Specialist - $100 Base + Uncapped Commission (3 Positions)
description:
Engaging 3 SDR Contractors - Cold
 Specialists for B2B SaaS (Tournament Structure)

$100 Base + Uncapped Commission · Direct Founder Collaboration



About the company:

Seen AI is a B2B SaaS helping US local service businesses appear in

AI search results: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, Gemini, and similar

platforms. We work with HVAC contractors, plumbers, restoration companies,

roofers, landscapers, and other trade businesses across the United States.

Website: nowseen.ai



The founder, Jackson Gordon, runs the company directly from Port

Macquarie, Australia (5 hours north of Sydney). You'll collaborate with

him directly during onboarding.



The opportunity:

Three SDR contractor positions are open. This is a tournament

structure. Three contractors start at the same time, same role, same

pay structure, same onboarding. After 30 days, performance is reviewed

transparently:



- Top 2 performers continue with growing books and increased earnings

- Bottom performer parts ways respectfully. No hard feelings, but the

  results d

- Top performer takes on team lead responsibilities by month 3 with

  elevated commission rates: 40% first-month and 15% recurring on their

  own sales (up from 30%/10%), and helps onboard future contractors.

  The promotion typically adds $1,000 to $3,000+ per month to their

  personal earnings at scale.



This structure is stated upfront. No surprises. The best contractors

rise. The hungry ones build a real career here.



The role:

Send personalized cold outreach to US small business owners and execute

follow-up sequences. You'll own 2-3 US metro areas and become the

expert in those markets.



You will not be cold calling, writing content, engaging in Reddit or

 groups, or closing sales. Those are different roles at Seen AI.

Your job is outbound. Doing it exceptionally well is how you earn the most.



The company provides:

- Warm prospect lists. You focus on outreach, not research

-
 templates that work

- Company sending infrastructure (dedicated
 accounts)

- Daily onboarding support during the first 14 days

- Direct collaboration with Jackson during onboarding



Compensation:



$100 USD/month guaranteed base (paid on the 1st of each month via Wise),

PLUS uncapped commission on every customer you sign:



- 30% of every customer's first-month payment to Seen AI

- 10% of every monthly payment for the next 12 months they stay subscribed



The base is a guaranteed minimum. You receive it regardless of

performance during the early months while you ramp. Your commissions

are uncapped on top.



What this looks like in real numbers:



For context: the average Manila SDR earns around $680 USD/month. The

top 10?rn around $1,100 USD/month. This contract structure is

designed to pay top performers 3 to 5 times that ceiling.



Realistic earnings progression:

- Month 1 (onboarding): $100 to $250 (base + early commissions while you learn)

- Month 2 (ramping): $400 to $800

- Month 3 (in rhythm): $800 to $1,500

- Month 6 at scale: $1,600 to $2,600

- Month 12 with full recurring stack: $2,600 to $3,600+



Top performers who consistently land enterprise/Pro tier accounts can

earn $4,000+ per month. There is no cap.



The structure is simple: every customer you sign pays you for the next

12 months. Sign 5 customers per month consistently and your recurring

stack alone will pay you more than the average Manila SDR salary,

before you've made a single new sale.



Commissions are paid 35 days after the customer's first successful

payment. If the customer disputes or refunds within that window, no

commission is paid. This protects both of us.



Recommended availability:

For maximum response rates, your outreach should hit US small business

owners during their morning hours (6am to 12pm EDT) when they actually

read
s. This corresponds to roughly 6pm to 12am Manila time, Monday

through Friday.



You manage your own schedule. Contractors who send outside this window

typically see lower reply rates, which directly impacts commission

earnings.



Jackson is typically available 6pm to 9pm Manila time for collaboration

and questions during the onboarding period.



Requirements:

- Native-level written English fluency

- Proven cold
 experience (B2B SaaS preferred)

- Reliable internet, dedicated quiet workspace

- Familiar with Gmail, Google Sheets, Calendar

- Self-directed, professional, coachable

- Available to start within 3 days of contract signing



This contract is for someone who wants to control their earnings. The

$100 base provides a guaranteed minimum during ramp, but the real money

is in commission. If you're someone who thrives on performance-based

income with unlimited upside, this is built for you.



Independent contractor engagement:



This is an independent contractor engagement, not employment:



- You are an independent contractor providing services to Seen AI

- You set your own schedule and work methods within agreed deliverable

  targets

- You provide your own workspace, internet, and personal equipment

- You are responsible for your own taxes, SSS, PhilHealth, and other

  contributions in the Philippines

- You may work with other clients provided there is no conflict of

  interest with Seen AI's business

- The engagement can be terminated by either party with reasonable notice

- This engagement does not constitute an employer-employee relationship

  under Philippine labor law



To apply, answer these 4 questions:



1. Write a 4-sentence cold
 pitching Seen AI to a hypothetical HVAC

   business owner. Use whatever you know about cold outreach. Be creative.

2. What was your most successful cold
 campaign in your previous

   role? What was the response rate, and how do you know?

3. If a prospect replies "not interested, take me off your list," what

   is your exact reply (verbatim)?

4. What is your biggest weakness as an SDR?



To stand out, also tell us:

- Why this specific contract (not a generic "I want to grow" answer)

- One thing about Seen AI's product that interests you (visit nowseen.ai

  before applying)



Applications missing any of the 4 questions won't be reviewed.



Selection timeline:

- Applications open immediately and close in 72 hours

- Top 10 candidates receive a trial task within 24 hours: send 5

  personalized cold
s to real prospects from a list we provide

  (around 30 minutes of work). We evaluate the actual
s, not your

  application essay.

- Top 6 from the trial task receive a 20-minute video call within

  48 hours

- Top 3 contracted within 7 days of posting

- Start date: within 3 days of contract signing



Total time from application to first day of work: under 10 days.



This trial task is unpaid. We're testing whether you can do the actual

work before we contract you. If you're not willing to write 5
s to

prove you can do the role, this isn't the contract for you.



Apply now. The first 30 days will tell us who's built for this.

title: Account Executive – Sports Uniforms & Athletic Gear (Remote)
description:
About Us



Phoenix Performance Solutions is a fast-growing U.S.-based sports company focused on custom uniforms, athletic gear, leagues, and performance products. We work with youth and adult sports organizations across the United States and are actively expanding our football, cheer, basketball, baseball, and softball divisions.



We are looking for a highly motivated remote Account Executive to help grow our custom sports uniform and gear business by building relationships with teams, leagues, coaches, athletic directors, and organizations.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.



---



## Compensation



* Hourly Pay: $5–$15 USD/hour depending on experience and communication skills

* Commission with each close. Higher commission with lower hourly rate. Structure



  * Sliding scale commissions based on profitability and deal structure

  * Higher-margin deals = higher commission opportunities

  * Strong performers may grow into leadership opportunities



---



## What You’ll Do



* Prospect and identify new leads across youth and adult sports organizations

* Reach out through:



  * Cold calling

  *
 outreach

  *
/social media outreach

  * Text messaging

  * Follow-up campaigns

* Build long-term relationships with coaches, leagues, and organizations

* Educate potential clients about our uniforms, apparel, and athletic gear

* Manage the relationship from initial contact through payment

* Pass completed order details to management/operations for mockups and production

* Ensure all client information and updates are logged accurately into Zoho CRM

* Follow up consistently with clients throughout the sales process

* Help generate repeat business and referrals



---



## What We Provide



* Sales guidance and onboarding

* Product education and pricing structure

* Marketing materials and resources

* Lead lists and outreach support

* Ongoing coaching and support

* AI/LLM tools and workflow recommendations

* Assistance on larger calls when needed



You will NOT be expected to figure everything out on your own. We want someone willing to learn, improve, and grow with the company.



---



## Requirements



### MUST HAVE:



* Strong spoken and written English

* Minimal accent and excellent communication skills

* Reliable internet connection

* Comfortable making outbound calls

* Comfortable with CRM usage and organization

* Ability to work during U.S. business hours (Central Time)

* Strong professionalism and ethical communication



### PREFERRED:



* Cold calling or sales experience

* Sports knowledge (football, cheer, basketball, baseball, softball)

* Experience using Zoho CRM or similar systems

* Familiarity with AI tools or LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

* Experience managing customer relationships long-term



---



## Important Notes



We are looking for relationship builders, not aggressive short-term salespeople.



We value professionalism, honesty, and long-term partnerships with our customers. Calls may occasionally be joined by management or recorded/shared internally for quality assurance, training, and maintaining ethical sales standards.



If you are someone who genuinely enjoys helping customers, building trust, and growing relationships, we would love to speak with you.



---

Bonus points if you have experience in sports apparel, uniforms, or athletic organizations.

4. Describe a Bid/Proposal You Helped Prepare

5. Internet Speed Test Screenshot

6. Your Available Working Hours (EST)



---



## Important Note



This is **NOT** a general admin VA role.

We are specifically seeking someone with experience in **government contracting / proposal support / procurement assistance** who can contribute meaningfully to our bidding operations.



If you are detail-oriented, deadline-driven, and experienced in supporting contract bidding efforts, we want to hear from you.

title: B2B Sales Development Rep (SDR)
description:
About This Role:

We are a North American agency that builds custom AI automation for service businesses. We answer every call, book every appointment, and handle follow-ups — 24/7. Our clients are med spas, HVAC companies, plumbers, roofers, and other service businesses across the US and Canada.

We are hiring outbound Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) to cold call business owners in the United States, qualify them, and book discovery calls for our founder to close. This is a high-activity outbound role — you will be dialing, talking to decision makers, and booking appointments every day.

This is not a customer service role. This is not lead research. This is cold calling. If you are great on the phone and can handle rejection while staying professional and persistent, read on.



What You Will Do

• Make 80–100 outbound cold calls per day to US business owners using a provided lead list

• Introduce our agency, qualify the prospect, and book a 20-minute discovery call with our founder

• Overcome objections professionally and follow a provided call script

• Log every call outcome accurately in a shared Google Sheet

• Attend a short daily check-in and flag blockers or questions

• Improve your pitch based on feedback from recorded call reviews



What You Will NOT Do

• You will NOT close deals yourself — your only job is to book a qualified call

• You will NOT research leads — we provide the contact list

• You will NOT do any admin, customer support, or account management



Compensation Structure

We offer a low base salary plus performance bonuses. The more you book and help close, the more you earn. Top performers will consistently earn above market rate.



Base Salary

• $300–$400 USD per month (based on experience and voice recording assessment)



Performance Bonuses

• $10 USD per qualified discovery call that shows up (prospect attends the call)

• $20 USD for every deal that closes — paid when setup fee is collected

• $30 USD bonus if YOU personally close the deal on your own call (for exceptional SDRs who develop into closers)



Example monthly earnings at solid performance:

• 20 showed calls = $200 in booking bonuses

• 6 closed deals = $120 in close bonuses

• Base = $350

• Total = approximately $670 USD for the month



Example monthly earnings at strong performance:

• 40 showed calls = $400 in booking bonuses

• 12 closed deals = $240 in close bonuses

• Base = $400

• Total = approximately $1,040 USD for the month



Example monthly earnings at top performance:

• 60 showed calls = $600 in booking bonuses

• 18 closed deals = $360 in close bonuses

• Base = $400

• Total = approximately $1,360 USD for the month



Payments are made bi-weekly via Wise or similar. Base is guaranteed. Bonuses are paid when conditions are met (showed call, collected payment).



Requirements

• Strong spoken English with a clear, professional accent — accent does not need to be American but must be easily understood by US business owners

• Previous outbound cold calling experience, ideally B2B

• Comfortable with rejection and able to make 80+ calls per day without losing energy

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment

• Available during US business hours (Eastern or Central time preferred)

• Honest and accurate in logging call outcomes — we verify using call recordings

• Able to follow a script while still sounding natural and human



Nice to Have

• Experience selling SaaS, software, or technology services

• Experience calling service businesses (healthcare, trades, hospitality)

• Familiarity with AI tools or automation products

• Prior experience using Apollo.io, JustCall, or similar outbound tools



Tools We Provide

• Curated lead list with verified US business owner contact details (via Apollo.io)

• JustCall account with a US phone number — all calls made and recorded through this system

• Call script, objection handling guide, and product training

• Google Sheet for daily call logging

• Access to recorded demo videos to understand the product



How to Apply

To be considered, your application MUST include all three of the following. Applications missing any item will not be reviewed.



1. A short note (3–5 sentences) explaining your outbound cold calling experience

Tell us specifically what you sold, who you called, and roughly how many calls per day you made.



2. Your best month's earnings from a previous commission or bonus role

This tells us you are motivated by performance pay, not just a paycheck.



3. A voice recording of yourself reading the following paragraph out loud

Record yourself reading this text exactly as written. Upload the file or share a link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or any audio file). This is how we assess your spoken English and phone presence.



VOICE RECORDING SCRIPT — read this out loud, exactly as written:

"Hi, this is [your name] calling for Jessica. I'm reaching out from RS — we help med spas and home service businesses like yours make sure every call gets answered, even when your team is busy with clients or on a job. I know you're probably in the middle of your day, so I'll keep this quick. Would you have about 20 minutes this week to see how it works? A lot of owners we speak to say they had no idea how many calls they were losing until they actually looked at the numbers."



Applications that do not include a voice recording will not be considered, regardless of experience.



A Note from the Founder

We are a lean, fast-moving agency. We do not have layers of management or long onboarding programs. You will work directly with me, get real feedback, and see the direct impact of your work. If you close a deal, I will know your name.

I am looking for someone who is hungry, honest, and wants to grow with the company. If you hit the numbers, the compensation grows with you. We are not capping you. The more you produce, the more you earn — and when we scale, the top performers will have first access to better roles, higher bonuses, and more hours.

If that sounds like the kind of environment where you do your best work, I want to hear from you.



- Matt -

title: Business Credit Expert
description:
We need a senior-level business credit card expert who brings deep, hands-on bank relationships, proven limit-negotiation wins, and a technical command of corporate card programs and credit underwriting.



looking for direct experience negotiating business/commercial credit card programs and credit lines with banks and issuing partners.

Demonstrated track record of securing substantial limit increases and improved program economics for mid-market or enterprise clients. Provide concrete examples (bank names, before/after limits or terms — redact sensitive client data if needed).

Deep network of active relationships with commercial card decision-makers at regional and national banks, issuing processors, and program managers.

Strong working knowledge of bank underwriting, credit risk drivers, covenant structures, personal guarantee mitigation, and secured vs. unsecured lending.

Skilled at building credit cases using financial statements, cash flow modeling, and merchant processing/transaction volume analysis.

Excellent negotiation skills, comfortable leading RFPs and complex contract discussions.

Results-oriented, independent operator; able to move quickly and close deals.

Nice-to-Have



Experience with corporate card platforms (e.g., Brex, Ramp, American Express commercial, Citi, Chase, Bank of America program offerings).

Familiarity with virtual card programs, T&E optimization, and payment automation integrations.

Prior experience advising founders/execs on personal guarantee avoidance and credit-preservation strategies.

Compensation & Structure

Competitive base plus performance-based bonus tied to achieved limit expansions, cost savings, and program KPIs. Equity may be available for exceptional candidates.



How to Apply

Send a brief cover note that highlights 2–3 specific bank negotiations you led (include outcome metrics), your top direct bank contacts (titles/roles only). In your cover note, include one short negotiation tactic you routinely use to win unsecured limit increases.



We’re not hiring junior-level generalists. If you’re a seasoned, deal-focused card strategist with proven bank access and negotiation chops, we want to talk.

title: Social Media Manager (Content Operations & Viral Strategy)
description:
Full-Time | Remote | 42 hours per week



We’re looking for someone who genuinely loves social media.



Not just casually using it! We mean the type of person who naturally studies trends, understands internet culture, notices when content is about to blow up, and somehow always knows what kind of posts people will engage with.



If your screen time report is slightly concerning and you treat scrolling like research… this role might actually be for you.





What This Role Actually Is:



This is not primarily a content creation role.



You will be managing and scaling social media pages that generate millions of views per month by helping d
:

- What content gets posted

- Which videos are strong enough to perform

- What fits each platform best

- What needs improvement before publishing



You’ll work closely with our content creation team by reviewing, organizing, and selecting content for posting while staying updated on platform trends, audience behavior, and social media best practices.



Think of yourself as the bridge between content creation and viral performance.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Managing and posting content across multiple social media pages

- Reviewing videos and determining which content is ready to publish

- Understanding platform guidelines, trends, and best practices

- Monitoring content performance and spotting opportunities to improve engagement

- Staying up-to-date on TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and internet culture

- Following internal workflows and maintaining organized content operations

- Working closely with the content team to help pages grow consistently





This role is perfect for someone who is:



• Chronically online (in a productive way)

• Passionate about social media and digital culture

• Highly reliable and organized

• Detail-oriented with strong instincts for what performs online

• Familiar with short-form content trends and platform guidelines

• Comfortable working independently and managing responsibilities remotely

• Fluent in English and communicates clearly

• Open to feedback and eager to improve



Gen Z applicants or candidates deeply familiar with Gen Z internet culture are strongly encouraged to apply, but this is not a requirement.



Experience is helpful, but we care more about:

* Work ethic

* Reliability

* Internet instincts

* Passion for social media



Why This Role Is Worth It



• Fully remote work

• Paid training and mentorship

• Performance-based bonuses

• Work on pages reaching millions of views

• No micromanagement

• Long-term growth opportunities within the company

• Learn real viral content strategy and social media operations



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. A  link to y our creative portfolio

2. 1–2 minute video introduction explaining why you’d be a great fit for this role



Your subject line should be: SUPERSTAR SMM



!!!! IMPORTANT !!!!



• No video introduction = automatic rejection



We’re looking for people with strong work ethic, curiosity, personality, and real passion for social media — not copy-paste applications.



If this sounds like something you’d genuinely enjoy doing long-term, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Chief of Staff to CEO – Execution and Leverage (Remote)
description:
Chief of Staff to CEO – Execution and Leverage (Remote)



Aureus Financial is scaling at over 100% year on year across nine business divisions. We are building toward a $100M group and are seeking a Chief of Staff to act as the CEO’s execution partner during this next phase of growth.



This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role. You will be taking over from a task-oriented EA model and stepping into a significantly higher-impact position. The expectation is ownership, judgment, and execution leadership.



*Do not apply if you cannot provide proof of at least 5 years experience in similar roles - unqualified applications will be ignored*



You will run the CEO’s inbox and calendar because that is where priorities are created or destroyed. But your real job is to convert strategy into shipped outcomes, create clarity across teams, and ensure nothing critical stalls due to lack of structure or follow-through.



If you have at least 5 years experience working closely with fast-paced founders or executives in high-growth environments, you will recognise the pace and responsibility immediately. If you are looking for a predictable, task-driven support role, this will not be a fit.



What You Will Own

CEO inbox and calendar as strategic tools. Execution cadence for CEO priorities. Project tracking, accountability, and delivery across divisions. Systems that create visibility and reduce friction. Follow-through on strategic initiatives and commitments.



How Success Is Measured

CEO trust and satisfaction at 9/10 or higher. CEO priorities moving forward without repeated follow-up. Increased CEO focus on strategy and growth. Faster execution and cleaner accountability across teams.



You Are Likely a Fit If

You have operated in a high-growth business. You think in systems and frameworks. You communicate clearly and decisively. You are comfortable pushing back and making judgment calls. You care deeply about outcomes and execution quality.



You Are Not a Fit If

You identify primarily as a task-based EA. You need detailed instructions to take action. You avoid accountability or difficult conversations. You prefer slow-moving, highly structured environments.



How to Apply



Review the job post - 



Submit your CV and a 2-3 minute Loom introducing yourself and explaining: What does an A+ week look like in this role, and how would you run the CEO office in your first 30 days?



Do not apply via OnlineJobs.



Applicants who do not complete the application requirements or send a generic application will not be considered.

title: Executive assistant to Business Advisor
description:
About the Role



I run The Granite Table — a business advisory firm that partners with small business owners to build systems that run without them at the center. I work across multiple client engagements simultaneously, which means my time is best spent advising, building, and closing — not managing my inbox, my calendar, chasing follow-ups, or figuring out what to post on LinkedIn.



I need an assistant who can step into that gap and own it.



This is the first hire inside my business. You won't just be executing tasks — you'll be learning how I think, learning my voice, and helping me stay consistent and accountable as the business grows. There's real room to grow here for the right person.



---



What You'll Do



• Draft and schedule LinkedIn posts based on my ideas, notes, and voice — I'll give you the raw material, you make it ready to post

• Send outreach messages and connection requests to business professionals on my behalf — not cold spam, warm and intentional

• Schedule calls, meetings, and networking sit-downs and manage my calendar end-to-end

• Keep my open task list organized and follow up on items that are sitting too long

• Hold me accountable to my weekly priorities and flag when something is slipping

• Handle administrative tasks — applications, research, platform setup, and similar items that need attention but not my direct involvement



---



What I'm Looking For



• Strong written English — you'll be communicating as an extension of me

• Comfortable with technology and actively uses AI tools in your work — this is non-negotiable

• Experience managing social media or professional outreach, LinkedIn preferred

• Organized, proactive, and comfortable working independently without being managed

• Reliable internet connection and availability for occasional overlap with US Mountain Time

• Someone who wants to grow with a business, not just fill a role

title: Property Accountant – US Real Estate (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
ABOUT THIS JOB



CinRetta Digital is a growing digital firm supporting US-based real estate and property management companies. We are expanding our accounting team and are looking for a skilled Property Accountant who can handle full-cycle property accounting tasks for multiple US client accounts.



This is a long-term, full-time remote role best suited for a Filipino accounting professional who is detail-oriented, self-motivated, and comfortable working independently with US clients.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



• Manage and maintain financial records for US-based property portfolios

• Process accounts payable and receivable for property management operations

• Perform bank reconciliations, tenant ledger reviews, and general ledger maintenance

• Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports

• Assist with budgeting, variance analysis, and operating expense reports

• Coordinate with property managers and clients on billing and collections

• Process rent rolls accurately and on time

• Ensure compliance with US GAAP and applicable accounting standards

• Assist with year-end closing and audit support



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE



• Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or equivalent

• 3+ years of accounting experience (property accounting experience is a big plus)

• Hands-on experience with accounting software: Yardi, MRI, AppFolio, or QuickBooks

• Strong Excel and Google Sheets proficiency

• Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal

• Strong attention to detail, organization, and ability to manage deadlines

• Can work independently and handle multiple client accounts



Nice to Have:

• Prior experience supporting US-based clients in a remote setup

• Familiarity with US GAAP and US real estate accounting workflows

• Experience using Google Workspace, Asana, or Slack



WHAT WE OFFER



• Stable, long-term full-time remote work

• Competitive compensation (to be discussed upon interview)

• Work-from-home setup with flexible and structured workflows

• Opportunity to work with US real estate clients and grow your expertise

• Supportive and collaborative team environment



HOW TO APPLY



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include:

• Your updated resume or CV

• A short cover letter explaining your property accounting experience

title: NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator (Candidate Pooling)
description:
Job Title: NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-time / Part-time





Position Summary



We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator to support the day-to-day administrative operations of an NDIS provider. This role focuses on participant onboarding, intake, service agreements, service bookings, rostering, scheduling, inbox management, stakeholder coordination, workforce compliance, and reporting support.



The ideal candidate has 4–5 years of experience in administration or coordination, preferably within NDIS, disability services, healthcare, or community services, and can manage multiple tasks accurately in a fast-paced remote environment.



Key Responsibilities



Manage participant intake and onboarding, including referrals, forms, consent documents, record setup, and file maintenance

Prepare, update, and track service agreements and assist with service bookings

Coordinate rostering, scheduling, calendar updates, appointment changes, and service confirmations

Manage shared inboxes, respond to routine queries, and coordinate communication with participants, families, staff, and stakeholders

Maintain worker compliance records, onboarding documents, clearances, certifications, and expiry tracking

Ensure participant, workforce, scheduling, and service records are accurate and updated across internal systems

Prepare trackers, reports, and status updates related to intake, rostering, compliance, and service administration

Monitor outstanding documents, onboarding progress, scheduling gaps, and compliance issues, and follow up as needed

Support smoother operations by identifying administrative gaps and helping improve workflows, templates, and processes



Requirements



4–5 years of experience in administration, coordination, or operations support

Previous experience in NDIS, disability services, healthcare, allied health, or community services preferred

Experience with participant onboarding, rostering, scheduling, service agreements, compliance tracking, and stakeholder communication

Strong knowledge of Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, CRM systems, and cloud-based admin tools

Excellent organisation, communication, and follow-up skills

High attention to detail, confidentiality, and ability to work independently



Key Skills



Participant onboarding and intake administration

Service agreements and service booking support

Scheduling, rostering, and calendar coordination

Inbox and stakeholder communication management

Worker compliance and workforce administration

Systems updating, reporting, and process improvement



Performance Indicators

Timely and accurate completion of onboarding and admin tasks

Accurate service agreement, booking, and compliance records

Efficient scheduling and rostering coordination

Timely response and follow-up on inbox and stakeholder communications

Quality of reports, trackers, and system updates

Strong support for smooth and organised daily operations



Why Join Us?



Be part of meaningful work that supports participants and care teams

Join a supportive and professional team that values collaboration

Enjoy remote flexibility in a structured work environment

Grow in a role where your skills and initiative are valued

Make a real impact through strong coordination and quality support



Ready to Apply?



If you’re organized, proactive, and ready to contribute to a purpose-driven team, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now and grow with us.

title: Senior Personal Injury Case Manager (100k+ Settlements & Paralegal Demand Experience)
description:
Schedule: Full time | Must work U.S. Pacific Time (California)

Department: Pre-Suit | Plaintiff Personal Injury

Reports To: Managing Attorney



About the Role

We are a fast growing, results oriented Plaintiff Personal Injury law firm seeking a highly experienced Senior Case Manager to step into a high responsibility role. You will manage high value personal injury cases from intake through settlement and close out. You will serve as the primary point of contact for our clients, coordinating medical treatment, managing complex insurance claims, preparing polished demand packages, and ensuring strict compliance with all deadlines.



We are looking for a true professional who thrives in a fast paced remote environment, communicates directly, and can manage a high volume of details without dropping the ball. If you are just looking to coast, this is not the job for you. If you are driven by results, value clear systems, and want to be rewarded for your hard work, we want to talk to you.



Key Responsibilities

Client Communication & Case Management:

• Serve as the primary client contact via phone,
, text, and client portal.

• Onboard new clients and clearly set expectations from day one.

• Provide regular case updates with empathy and professionalism.

• Maintain organized, highly detailed case notes and next actions in our case management system.



Insurance Claims & Coverage:

• Open and aggressively manage Bodily Injury, MedPay/PIP (if applicable), and UM/UIM claims.

• Rapidly obtain declarations pages, policy limits, and adjuster information.

• Request, track, and file UM/UIM Selection or Rejection Letters for applicable policies.

• Ensure complete and timely coverage verification for every file.



Deadlines & Compliance:

• Calendar and meticulously track California deadlines, including the 2 year statute of limitations and municipal/ante litem notice deadlines.

• Maintain a standard of zero missed deadlines and perfectly accurate documentation.



Medical Treatment & Records:

• Coordinate medical provider referrals under attorney direction.

• Monitor treatment progress and MMI status.

• Request, track, and strictly quality check HIPAA compliant medical records and bills.



Liens & Subrogation:

• Open and tightly manage Medicaid, Medicare, ERISA, and private health insurance liens.

• Obtain final lien demands and assist with aggressive reductions.



Demands, Settlement & Close Out:

• Prepare highly polished demand packages, including liability summaries, damages narratives, medical specials spreadsheets, and supporting exhibits.

• Support settlement negotiations for high value cases under attorney supervision.

• Process settlements, releases, disbursements, and case close out checklists.



Performance Metrics (KPIs):

We use KPI tracking to reward high performers with bonuses, not for micromanagement. You will be measured on:

• Time from assignment to demand and settlement.

• Coverage completeness (UM/UIM letters and verified limits secured within 30 days).

• Medical records turnaround time and first pass completeness.

• Zero missed deadlines and clean CRM documentation.



Qualifications:

• Proven plaintiff personal injury pre-suit case management experience.

• California PI experience is strongly preferred (or a rigorous willingness to learn CA specific rules).

• Deep working knowledge of UM/UIM, MedPay/PIP, medical billing terminology, and complex liens/subrogation.

• Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.

• Highly organized, detail oriented, proactive, and tech savvy.

• Prior experience working effectively in a fast paced environment.

• Reliable, professional, and comfortable working completely independently in a remote setting.



Technology & Tools

• Experience with at least one major PI case management system (Filevine, Needles, SmartAdvocate, Lead Docket).

• Comfortable with Microsoft 365.

• Familiar with e-fax, e-signature tools, and VOIP systems.

(Training is provided for firm specific tools.)



Workspace & Application Requirements:

To support a successful remote work environment and ensure you are set up for long term success, applicants MUST include the following in their proposal:

• A short video introduction.

• A brief view of your dedicated workspace.

• A link or screenshot confirming your internet speed and computer specifications.

(These materials help us ensure long term success in a fully remote role.)



Compensation & Benefits:

• $2,500 USD Monthly, paid bi-weekly. Negotiable depending on experience.

• 40 hour work week from 9 AM to 6 PM Pacific Time.

• Aggressive performance bonuses tied to KPIs (Up to $1,000 USD).

• Full time, long term position.

• An efficient team environment with well defined processes, direct collaboration with a U.S. attorney, and major opportunities for growth.



Why Join Our Firm

• Stable, long term remote role (not project based)

• Direct collaboration with U.S. attorney

• Well defined processes and realistic expectations

• Opportunity to grow with a plaintiff side personal injury practice

title: Gempages / Webflow Builder - Advertorials, Listicles & Quiz Funnels
description:
Job Title:

Gempages / Webflow Builder - Advertorials, Listicles & Quiz Funnels

Job Type:

Full-time / Part-time (open to both)

Compensation:

To be discussed based on experience



About Us

We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand running paid traffic on Meta and TikTok in the US market. To convert that traffic into buyers, we build high-converting landing pages, advertorials, listicles and quiz funnels. We are looking for a skilled page builder who knows how to make pages that do not just look good but actually sell.



What You Will Be Doing



Building advertorials and listicles in Gempages or Webflow that warm up cold traffic coming from paid ads

Building interactive quiz funnels that guide visitors toward a product recommendation and purchase

Translating provided copy and wireframes into clean, fast-loading pages

Making sure pages are fully optimized for mobile

Matching the design closely to provided references or brand guidelines

Running quick revision rounds based on feedback

Collaborating with our media buyer and copywriter to make sure the page matches the ad creative





What We Are Looking For



Proven experience building pages in Gempages, Webflow, or both

Strong understanding of advertorial and listicle page structure

Experience building quiz funnels (TypeForm, ScoreApp, or custom built)

Sharp eye for layout, spacing, typography and mobile responsiveness

Ability to work from a written brief or wireframe without needing everything spelled out

Fast turnaround and reliable communication

Good written English





Nice to Have



Experience working with direct-to-consumer or e-commerce brands

Understanding of how paid traffic flows into a landing page funnel

Basic knowledge of conversion rate optimization principles

Familiarity with tools like Hotjar or Microsoft Clarity for post-launch analysis





Types of Pages You Will Build

Advertorials

Long-form editorial-style pages written to read like an article but designed to sell. These pages come in from a paid ad and need to feel trustworthy, flow naturally and lead the reader toward a purchase decision.

Listicles

Ranked list-style pages such as "Top 5 Laundry Products That Actually Remove Odor" that compare options and position our product as the clear winner. Clean layout, fast loading, easy to read on mobile.

Quiz Funnels

Multi-step interactive quizzes that ask the visitor a series of questions and recommend a product based on their answers. These need to feel smooth, personalized and low-friction from start to finish.



How to Apply

To be considered for this role you must send us your portfolio. Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

Please send the following:



A short introduction about yourself and your background (5 sentences maximum)

Your portfolio showing at least 2 to 3 examples of pages you have built, ideally including at least one advertorial, one listicle or one quiz funnel

The tools and platforms you are most comfortable working in

Your availability and expected monthly rate



We review every application and respond to strong fits within 3 business days.

title: Ad Creative Specialist
description:
Please share your portfolio when you apply.



Remote · Philippines · Full-Time

Department: Growth & Performance Marketing   ·   Reports to: Head of Creative and CMO

Yepoda is a fast-growing K-Beauty DTC brand on a mission to make effective skincare accessible and joyful. To win in the current social landscape we need a relentless creative engine — someone who lives and breathes short-form content, understands the Meta and TikTok algorithms, and uses AI tools to ship more, faster.

???? Location

Philippines (Remote) 

???? Hours Full-Time, 40 h/wk ????

 Salary PHP 35,000–55,000/mo 

???? Start ASAP



About the Role

As Yepoda’s Ad Creative Specialist you will be the engine behind our paid social growth. You will produce a high volume of scroll-stopping ads for Instagram,
, and TikTok every single week. This is a pure execution role — briefs come from the PM and Growth team, and your job is to bring them to life visually and get them out the door fast, using AI tools to multiply your output without sacrificing quality.

You will work closely with the Growth and PM team, receive clear creative briefs, and be trusted to translate them into platform-native content that stops the scroll. Speed, craft, and reliability are what we need from you.



What You’ll Do

Creative Production (70%)

• Receive creative briefs from the PM and Growth team and translate them into finished ad assets — no guesswork, just great execution.

• Produce 10–15 new ad creatives per week across Instagram Feed, Reels,
 Feed & Stories, and TikTok.

• Design static and motion graphics using Canva, Adobe Express, CapCut, or equivalent tools.

• Edit UGC and brand video footage into polished, platform-native short-form ads (15–60 sec).

• Use AI tools (e.g. Runway, Pika, ElevenLabs, Midjourney) to accelerate production and build creative variations fast.

• Build iterative creative variations from each brief to enable systematic A/B testing.

• Maintain organised asset libraries and a weekly delivery schedule with zero missed deadlines.



Performance & Iteration (20%)

• Review weekly ad performance reports shared by the Growth team and flag creative fatigue early.

• Suggest fresh visual or format angles when a creative is losing steam — the strategic direction stays with the PM team, but your production instincts matter.

• Maintain a structured delivery and testing log so the team always knows what is live, what is in production, and what has been retired.

• Stay ahead of trending audio, formats, and visual styles on TikTok and Instagram Reels and surface relevant opportunities to the team.



Collaboration & Process (10%)

• Join a weekly creative briefing call with the PM and Growth team to receive and clarify upcoming briefs.

• Ask smart questions when a brief is unclear — better to align upfront than to redo work.

• Provide clear ETAs and flag blockers early — proactive communication is essential.

• Help maintain Yepoda’s visual brand guidelines for paid social as the library grows.



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

• 2+ years experience producing paid social ad creatives (Meta and/or TikTok) — ideally for a DTC or e-commerce brand.

• Proficient in video editing: CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent.

• Strong graphic design skills: Canva Pro, Figma, or Adobe Express.

• Ability to read a brief and translate it faithfully into compelling visuals — you execute the creative vision, not define it.

• Hands-on experience with at least 2–3 AI creative tools (e.g. Runway, Midjourney, ElevenLabs, Pika).

• A fast, self-directed working style — you manage your own queue and hit deadlines consistently.

• Portfolio or examples of paid social ads you have created (required to apply).



Nice-to-Have

• Experience in beauty, skincare, or wellness brands.

• On-camera confidence or willingness to appear in UGC-style content.

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager or TikTok Ads Manager (understanding of creative formats, aspect ratios, specs).

• Knowledge of K-Beauty trends and aesthetics.

• Basic motion graphics or After Effects skills.



Tools You’ll Use

Category Tools

Video Editing CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve

Design Canva Pro, Figma, Adobe Express

AI — Video Runway, Pika Labs, Kling

AI — Image Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, DALL·E

AI — Copy / Voice ChatGPT, Claude, ElevenLabs

Project Management Notion, Slack, Google Drive



What We Offer

• Competitive salary: PHP 35,000–55,000/month depending on experience.

• Fully remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines.

• 13th month pay and statutory Philippine benefits (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG).

• Budget for AI tool subscriptions and creative software.

• Generous product allowance — you’ll always have the latest Yepoda skincare.

• A lean, fast-moving team that values your output and gives you real ownership.

• Direct exposure to performance data so you can see the impact of your work.
